Title: Social Data Analyst
Description:
Ciao, sono Francesca, Strategy, Marketing & Content Director in The Next Generation Platform, e sono alla ricerca di un* Social Data Analyst con forte specializzazione in social media analytics e digital intelligence che supporti il team strategy nello sviluppo di sistemi avanzati di social reporting, performance monitoring e social listening.

Due indicazioni sulla company, sul team e sul ruolo.

Partiamo Dalla Company

Together è l’agenzia di comunicazione di The Next Generation Platform. Traduciamo strategie guidate dal significato in strategie e campagne a impatto generativo. Sviluppiamo idee che aiutano i brand a diventare agenti di cambiamento positivo, attraverso un approccio strategico e creativo unico, basato sull’essere umano.

Di cosa ci occupiamo?

Dalla discovery alla definizione di brand purpose e strategie di brand, fino alla realizzazione di campagne, progetti creativi integrati e content strategy, media strategy, reporting & optimization.

Nella Pratica

La figura che cerchiamo avrà un ruolo chiave nella progettazione e implementazione di un nuovo ecosistema di reporting e analisi dati social, contribuendo a trasformare dati e conversazioni online in insight strategici per clienti e team interni.

Social performance & reporting


Progettare e sviluppare dashboard di social performance (organico + paid)
Monitorare KPI e performance dei contenuti e delle campagne
Creare report operativi e strategici per clienti e team interni
Supportare strategy e content team nell’interpretazione dei dati



Social listening & digital intelligence


Analizzare conversazioni online attraverso tool di social listening
Costruire query di ascolto e taxonomy di analisi
Analizzare sentiment, topic, trend culturali e community signals
Trasformare i dati in insight utili per strategie di comunicazione e contenuto



Reporting infrastructure


Valutare e comparare tool di social listening e social reporting
Supportare l’implementazione o migrazione verso un nuovo sistema di reportistica
Definire standard di KPI, metric mapping e continuità storica dei dati
Supportare budgeting e valutazione dei costi delle piattaforme



Sei la persona che stiamo cercando se hai…


5 o più anni di esperienza in social data analysis o digital intelligence
Esperienza in agenzie di comunicazione, centri media o consulenza digitale
Esperienza nella costruzione di dashboard e sistemi di reporting multi-cliente
Forte capacità analitica e di sintesi
Ottima conoscenza delle principali metriche social e digital (reach, engagement, retention, video metrics, audience growth, performance paid).
Esperienza su più piattaforme come: Brandwatch, Talkwalker, Meltwater, Sprinklr, Pulsar, Emplifi. Ottima conoscenza di: Looker Studio, Funnel.io
Data visualization
Familiarità con piattaforme adv: Meta, TikTok, YouTube / Google e LinkedIn
Attitudine a trasformare dati complessi in insight chiari e azionabili
Curiosità verso evoluzione delle piattaforme social e dei tool di analisi
Attitudine alla collaborazione con team strategy, content e media



Cosa Offriamo


Contratto a tempo indeterminato full time con un range di RAL previsto tra 33.000-35.000€
Flessibilità: smart libero. La performance la misuriamo sugli obiettivi, non in ore lavorate
Buoni pasto di 8€/giorno anche quando sei in smart
Welfare su piattaforma dedicata



Iter Di Selezione


Leggeremo il tuo CV (non Europass please!);
Videocall con People&Culture
Invio Business Case
Colloquio in presenza: ti inviteremo al C32 per un colloquio e conoscerai diverse key people di Together. Si parlerà di ruolo, aspettative, culture fit e opportunità di crescita.



Se senti che questa realtà e questa opportunità sono in linea con il tuo percorso e le tue ambizioni, inviaci la tua candidatura: non vediamo l’ora di conoscerti!

Garantiamo un processo di selezione equo, aperto a tutte le persone, indipendentemente da genere, età, origine, orientamento sessuale, disabilità o qualsiasi altra caratteristica protetta dalla normativa vigente (L. 903/77 e L. 125/91)

  • Trasformare i dati in insight utili per strategie di comunicazione e contenuto


Reporting infrastructure

  • Valutare e comparare tool di social listening e social reporting
  • Supportare l’implementazione o migrazione verso un nuovo sistema di reportistica
  • Definire standard di KPI, metric mapping e continuità storica dei dati
  • Supportare budgeting e valutazione dei costi delle piattaforme


Sei la persona che stiamo cercando se hai…

  • 5 o più anni di esperienza in social data analysis o digital intelligence
  • Esperienza in agenzie di comunicazione, centri media o consulenza digitale
  • Esperienza nella costruzione di dashboard e sistemi di reporting multi-cliente
  • Forte capacità analitica e di sintesi
  • Ottima conoscenza delle principali metriche social e digital (reach, engagement, retention, video metrics, audience growth, performance paid).
  • Esperienza su più piattaforme come: Brandwatch, Talkwalker, Meltwater, Sprinklr, Pulsar, Emplifi. Ottima conoscenza di: Looker Studio, Funnel.io
  • Data visualization
  • Familiarità con piattaforme adv: Meta, TikTok, YouTube / Google e LinkedIn
  • Attitudine a trasformare dati complessi in insight chiari e azionabili
  • Curiosità verso evoluzione delle piattaforme social e dei tool di analisi
  • Attitudine alla collaborazione con team strategy, content e media


Cosa Offriamo

  • Contratto a tempo indeterminato full time con un range di RAL previsto tra 33.000-35.000€
  • Flessibilità: smart libero. La performance la misuriamo sugli obiettivi, non in ore lavorate
  • Buoni pasto di 8€/giorno anche quando sei in smart
  • Welfare su piattaforma dedicata


Iter Di Selezione

  • Leggeremo il tuo CV (non Europass please!);
  • Videocall con People&Culture
  • Invio Business Case
  • Colloquio in presenza: ti inviteremo al C32 per un colloquio e conoscerai diverse key people di Together. Si parlerà di ruolo, aspettative, culture fit e opportunità di crescita.


Se senti che questa realtà e questa opportunità sono in linea con il tuo percorso e le tue ambizioni, inviaci la tua candidatura: non vediamo l’ora di conoscerti!

Garantiamo un processo di selezione equo, aperto a tutte le persone, indipendentemente da genere, età, origine, orientamento sessuale, disabilità o qualsiasi altra caratteristica protetta dalla normativa vigente (L. 903/77 e L. 125/91)

#together #thenextgenerationplatform

Title: Financial Data Analyst Trainee
Description:
We are looking for a brilliant and tech-savvy Financial Data Analyst Trainee to join our Milan HQ.

The Financial Data Analyst Trainee will support the FP&A team in ensuring accurate financial and operational data management through advanced reporting, dashboarding, and analytics. Reporting directly to the Senior Manufacturing Controller, he/she will contribute to transforming data into actionable insights to support strategic decisions.

Do you match this profile?


Bachelor/Master’s degree in Management Engineering, Data Science, Finance, Economics, or related fields.
Previous experience (or internship) in FP&A, Data Analysis, or similar finance roles with strong exposure to data tools.
Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Power BI; experience with ERP systems (SAP) and planning tools (Anaplan) is a strong plus.
Strong analytical and quantitative skills, with a structured and data-driven mindset.
Ability to manage large datasets and extract business insights through data visualization and storytelling.
Proactive, detail-oriented, and eager to work in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
Italian is mandatory (spoken and written).
Fluency in English (spoken and written).


If so, apply for this job!

What do we expect from you?


Support financial planning and forecasting processes through data modeling and scenario analysis.
Participate in monthly and quarterly closing activities, ensuring consistency across systems and data sources.
Maintain, optimize, and develop dashboards and reporting tools (Power BI, Excel, etc.) to monitor financial and operational KPIs.
Deliver ad hoc and structured analysis leveraging data science techniques to identify trends, anomalies, and opportunities.
Contribute to the automation and digitalization of FP&A processes, improving efficiency and data accuracy.


The Recruitment Process


Apply online
If your profile matches our search, you will be contacted by our HR team for a first exploratory interview. Otherwise, you will receive an e-mail to inform you that we will not proceed with your application.
If the first interview turns out to be successful, you’ll meet the Senior Manufacturing Controller.

Title: Junior Data Analyst
Description:
Everience è un gruppo internazionale di consulenza che offre servizi digitali potenziati dall’intelligenza artificiale e pone le persone al centro della rivoluzione dell’AI. Presente in Europa, Africa, Asia e America, Everience offre ai suoi 4.000 collaboratori un ambiente stimolante e sfidante in cui trasformare e sviluppare le proprie competenze, esplorando nuovi ruoli basati sull’AI e costruendo la propria occupabilità futura. Attraverso la sua Symbiotic Academy, il gruppo offre un hub unico per formazione, applicazione pratica e condivisione, dove ognuno può sperimentare, apprendere e progredire nei campi dell’intelligenza artificiale e dei dati.

In linea con la sua missione di orchestrare la relazione simbiotica tra esseri umani e intelligenza artificiale sul posto di lavoro, Everience fa del dipendente aumentato il motore di un’“età simbiotica”, in cui l’AI valorizza i talenti e apre nuove opportunità di carriera.







Siamo alla ricerca di un Data Analyst Junior per attività presso nostro cliente diretto. In questo ruolo, ti occuperai di trasformare i dati in informazioni utili che guidino le decisioni aziendali e sostengano la crescita dell'organizzazione. Lavorerai in collaborazione con team interfunzionali per identificare le esigenze in materia di dati, sviluppare analisi complete e fornire report chiari che consentano agli stakeholder di prendere decisioni informate.




Qualifiche




Laurea triennale in informatica, scienza dei dati, matematica, statistica o in un campo affine
2-3 anni di esperienza professionale come analista di dati
Ottima padronanza di SQL per l'estrazione, la trasformazione e l'analisi dei dati
Esperienza pratica con strumenti di BI (Power BI)
Ottime competenze nella visualizzazione dei dati e nello sviluppo di dashboard
Solida comprensione delle metodologie di analisi dei dati e dei concetti statistici
Capacità di lavorare in modo autonomo e di prendere l'iniziativa nei progetti
Esperienza nella collaborazione con gli stakeholder aziendali per tradurre i requisiti in soluzioni analitiche
Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese (livello B2)




Ulteriori informazioni




L'attività è in full-time presso la sede del cliente sita a Sovico (MB).

E' prevista modalità di lavoro in smart working (1 giorno alla settimana)




Valutiamo assunzione con contratto a tempo indeterminato (CCNL Commercio).




Tutti i nostri annunci sono rivolti ad entrambi i sessi, ai sensi delle leggi 903/77 e 125/91, e a persone di tutte le età e tutte le nazionalità, ai sensi dei decreti legislativi 215/03 e 216/03.

Title: Fraud Data Analyst - Luxembourg
Description:
Please note that this opportunity requires relocation to our Luxembourg office.

About Us

Satispay began by rethinking the simple act of a payment to remove the friction from our daily routines. But we didn't stop there. Today, we are building a complete financial platform designed to empower people and concretely improve their lives.

By giving our 6 million users a clear, open path to pay, save, and invest, we are evolving into the definitive destination for every financial need.

What You'll Be Doing

As our Fraud Data Analyst, you'll be the person who secures the future of digital payments by architecting sophisticated real-time defense strategies.

Here's What Your Day-to-day Will Look Like


Architect Real-Time Strategies – You will be responsible for our real-time decisioning engine, designing and deploying logic that combines ML scores with velocity features to make millisecond decisions.
Precision Rule Development – Translate complex fraud patterns into high-performing rules, optimizing the balance between False Positive Rates (FPR) and Gross Fraud Loss.
Deconstruct Payment Fraud – Proactively hunt for emerging schemes (ATO, social engineering) and turn these insights into end-to-end mitigation strategies.
Optimize the Decisioning Stack – Partner with Product and Engineering to define analytical requirements for new features and third-party data signals.
Calibrate ML & Heuristics – Work with Data Science to operationalize machine learning models, determining how to best "wrap" model scores with heuristic rules.
Champion Frictionless UX – Analyze security measures to identify unnecessary hurdles, designing dynamic friction strategies for a seamless user experience.
Strategic Performance Reporting – Monitor rule efficacy and portfolio health, presenting data-driven recommendations to senior leadership to evolve our risk appetite.


Expect challenges, collaboration, and the freedom to bring your ideas to life in a fast-moving and supportive environment. Things change quickly here, so be ready to adapt, take initiative, and shape your role as we grow.

Who We're Looking For

We need a problem-solver who loves teamwork and gets things done. If you're curious and ready for real ownership, you'll fit in! Does this sound like you?


Experience – You have between 3 and 7 years of professional experience, specifically within the risk, payments, or credit sectors.
Technical Proficiency – You are highly skilled in SQL and Python for data analysis and strategy development.
Domain Expertise – You have a solid understanding of payment fraud dynamics and experience working with real-time decisioning environments.
Communication – You possess excellent communication skills and are fluent in English.
Nice to Have – Experience with Machine Learning, Data Science, PySpark, or GraphQL knowledge is a significant plus.


CareAbout: how we support your impact

About

We move fast, and evolution never stops. It's a fun ride, but it can be challenging. To make sure our people truly thrive, we're committed to making their lives easier, both in the office and out in the world. That's why we created CareAbout:


❤️ Health (Private insurance for you and your family, psychological support with Serenis, mental health workshops)
💰 Financial resources (Stock Option Plan, Meal vouchers, Relocation support if you're moving countries)
⚙️ Growth and development (Professional development programs, Internal mobility, Language courses with Preply)
🌱 Flexibility (Unlimited PTO, Hybrid working policy*, Flexible working hours)
👨‍👩‍👧 Family (Enhanced parental leave, Additional leave for child sickness)
We embrace three days per week in-office (Tuesday and Thursday + 1 of your choice), with the option to request extra remote time.


Equal Opportunity Employer

At Satispay, we're proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and inclusion, welcoming individuals of all backgrounds. This opportunity is open to everyone, regardless - for instance - of race, colour, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, and national origin. Join us in a workplace where everyone belongs!

Learn more about us

Our values and pillars aren't just fancy words on a page - they really shape everything we do. Explore them here.

By submitting this application, I acknowledge that I have read and understood the content of the Privacy Policy

Title: Analyst
HTML:
🚀 La Vision

Massima Energia nasce con una missione chiara: rendere semplice ciò che è complesso.

Stiamo costruendo una piattaforma AI-first che vuole semplificare radicalmente il modo in cui le persone accedono ai servizi: energia, mobile, internet e molto altro, in un unico ecosistema progettato intorno al cliente. Non stiamo ottimizzando un modello esistente. Lo stiamo riscrivendo. Con MaxTech, il nostro hub tecnologico, trasformiamo dati e intelligenza artificiale in decisioni automatiche, processi più efficienti ed esperienze migliori per milioni di utenti.


Oggi i nostri clienti ci riconoscono un punteggio di 4.6/5 su Trustpilot.

👉 Cerchiamo persone che vogliono contribuire concretamente a questa evoluzione.


🎯 Il Tuo Obiettivo

Trasformare dati complessi in decisioni semplici e ad alto impatto.

Sarai responsabile non solo dell’analisi, ma della qualità e dell’affidabilità del dato su cui l’azienda prende decisioni.

Il tuo successo sarà misurato sulla capacità di:

  • generare insight utili e concreti;
  • migliorare le performance dei team;
  • rendere i dati più chiari, coerenti e utilizzabili.

👉 Il tuo lavoro avrà impatto diretto su prodotto, marketing e operations.


🛠 Cosa farai

  • Svilupperai dashboard e report in Power BI utilizzati quotidianamente dal business;
  • Trasformerai dati complessi in insight chiari e azionabili;
  • Scriverai query SQL per estrarre, trasformare e validare dati;
  • Collaborerai con Marketing, Sales e Operations per supportare decisioni data-driven;
  • Analizzerai trend, anomalie e opportunità di miglioramento;
  • Migliorerai qualità, struttura e affidabilità del dato, lavorando su dataset complessi e interrogazioni avanzate per estrarre insight non immediatamente evidenti, scegliendo di volta in volta gli strumenti analitici più efficaci;
  • Contribuirai a progetti di automazione e data enhancement;
  • Supporterai iniziative legate a intelligenza artificiale e automazione in ottica analitica e di business intelligence.

👉 Non è un ruolo di sola reportistica.

👉 Ci aspettiamo che i tuoi output generino decisioni e risultati.


👤 Chi cerchiamo

  • 1–3 anni di esperienza in ruoli di Data Analyst o simili;
  • Ottima conoscenza di Power BI;
  • Esperienza con SQL / MySQL;
  • Buona conoscenza di Python per analisi e automazione;
  • Padronanza avanzata di Excel;
  • Forte capacità analitica applicata al business: sai leggere i dati, individuare pattern e trasformarli rapidamente in azioni che migliorano le performance;
  • Curiosità e attenzione estrema al dettaglio: vuoi capire il “perché” dietro ogni numero e hai un’ossessione per la correttezza, coerenza e affidabilità del dato;
  • Approccio hands-on e orientamento ai risultati;
  • Mentalità strutturata e problem solving.


✨ Cosa offriamo

  • Impatto diretto sul business fin da subito;
  • Ambiente dinamico e in forte crescita;
  • Collaborazione con team cross-funzionali;
  • Progetti concreti su dati e intelligenza artificiale;
  • Percorsi di crescita e mentoring;
  • Pacchetto retributivo competitivo (range 27.000 – 40.000 € in base all’esperienza).


Sede di lavoro

Milano (in presenza, 1 giorno alla settimana di flexible working).

Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Data Analyst in Italy.

This is a high-impact analytics role at the core of a fast-growing, performance-driven digital organization. You will transform complex marketing, financial, and operational data into clear insights that directly shape business strategy and decision-making. Acting as a key partner to leadership, finance, and operations teams, you will build forecasting models, reporting systems, and automated data workflows that improve visibility and drive performance. The role combines technical depth with business acumen, requiring someone who can move seamlessly between data infrastructure, analysis, and strategic storytelling. You will operate in a fast-paced, fully remote environment where ownership, precision, and scalability are essential. This position is ideal for a data professional who enjoys building systems that power real-time, high-stakes business decisions.

Accountabilities


Develop and maintain forecasting models for revenue, headcount, and business performance to support strategic planning and decision-making.
Translate historical and operational data into forward-looking insights, identifying risks, trends, and growth opportunities.
Build, maintain, and optimize dashboards using BI tools such as Power BI, Looker, Tableau, or similar platforms.
Design standardized reporting frameworks for marketing, client performance, media spend, and core business KPIs.
Automate manual reporting processes by building scalable data pipelines and integrating multiple data sources.
Manage and enhance data workflows using tools such as Supermetrics, Google Sheets, and Apps Script for seamless reporting automation.
Ensure data integrity, consistency, and quality across all reporting systems and databases.
Design and maintain structured databases to support operations, finance, and performance reporting needs.


Requirements


3-6 years of experience in data analytics, business intelligence, or similar roles, preferably in fast-paced digital, agency, or DTC environments.
Strong proficiency in SQL, Python, or equivalent tools for data analysis, querying, and pipeline development.
Advanced expertise in Google Sheets and Excel, including complex formulas, automation, and scripting (Apps Script preferred).
Hands-on experience with BI tools such as Power BI, Looker, Tableau, or comparable platforms.
Strong understanding of marketing and performance data, including familiarity with paid media platforms like Meta, Google, and TikTok.
Experience building dashboards, reporting systems, and automated data workflows from multiple data sources.
Strong systems thinking with the ability to design scalable, reliable data infrastructure rather than one-off reports.
High attention to detail with strong problem-solving skills and data accuracy mindset.
Ability to work independently in a remote, fast-paced environment with strong ownership and accountability.
Excellent communication skills to translate data insights into clear business recommendations.


Benefits


Competitive monthly compensation in the range of $2,000-$4,000 USD.
Fully remote work setup with global team collaboration.

Description:
Job Purpose/Role

Parte del Lead Strategy Team, la posizione garantisce la misurazione e l’ottimizzazione delle performance lungo tutto il lead funnel, supportando strategie di generation e massimizzando i tassi di conversione

Key Responsibilities


Monitorare e analizzare il lead funnel end-to-end in termini di KPIs
Sviluppare modelli di attribuzione di lead per massimizzarne la conversione
Creare dashboard e report di funnel performance per i team di business
Collaborare alle strategie di sviluppo e implementazione del funnel per massimizzare cost per volume, cost per lead, conversion e nuovo business generato
Collaborare con Paid Media e UX Specialist


Key Requirements


5 o più anni di esperienza in marketing e data analytics e performance
Competenze in funnel analysis, attribution modelling e full-funnel reporting
Ottima padronanza di strumenti BI/CRM
Capacità di trasformare dati complessi in strategie di lead optimization
Mentalità analitica e consulenziale, orientata ai risultati di conversion


Il Gruppo Allianz è una delle società assicurative e di asset management che godono di maggior fiducia al mondo. Prendersi cura dei nostri dipendenti, delle loro ambizioni, sogni e sfide è ciò che ci rende un datore di lavoro unico. Title: Elite - Business Data Analyst
Description:
Euronext is the leading pan-European market infrastructure, connecting European economies to global capital markets, to accelerate innovation and sustainable growth. It operates regulated exchanges in Belgium, France, Ireland, Italy, the Netherlands, Norway and Portugal.

The Group provides a multi-asset clearing house through Euronext Clearing, and custody and settlement services through Euronext Securities central securities depositories in Denmark, Italy, Norway and Portugal. Euronext also leverages its expertise in running markets by providing technology and managed services to third parties. In addition to its main regulated market, it also operates a number of junior markets, simplifying access to listing for SMEs.

About ELITE

ELITE is the Euronext ecosystem to support private companies by connecting them to skills, network and capital to drive their sustainable growth in the long-term, allowing them to access private and public capital markets.

The ELITE Offer Is Built Around Three Pillars

Access to skillset and expertise, via a proprietary training program covering a range of topics, from growth strategy to innovation and internationalization, from risk management to corporate governance to funding options. Access to an international network: ELITE members benefit from exposure to leading peers and advisors, as well as media coverage and access to exclusive events Access to growth capital, via traditional or alternative funding solutions, acting as a bridge from private to public.

Since ELITE’s launch, more than 2.300 companies have been part of the ELITE network, which today counts 1.500+ companies with an aggregate revenue of around €188 billion, representing 39 sectors and employing 652.000 people. ELITE has been a successful story, providing concrete support to many companies to accelerate their growth: €947 million raised with direct support from ELITE for over 260 companies leveraging also on the Basket Bond model, 76 companies have been listed raising €3.8 billion, 187 companies issued 269 bonds raising €3,55 billion, and 528 companies managed over 1.750 M&A deals.

ELITE – Business Data Analyst

The resource - within the Strategy and Business Development division - will support data-driven activities and strategic initiatives by gathering, organizing and analysing information from complex datasets to extract actionable insights in order to enhance business performance and decision-making, both for internal scope (i.e. analysis, reporting, new members onboarding, …) and for business development insights (i.e. clients' needs mapping, data strategy evolution, data-driven upselling/cross selling opportunities).

The Business Data Analyst will work in coordination with the other ELITE's business divisions including product, sales and marketing to continuously enhance and foster a data driven approach across all ELITE’s functions.

Activities will involve data operations and manipulation tasks including cleaning and integration. The resource will use tools such as Excel and query languages to transform and enrich data through data mapping techniques, and tools such as Power BI to analyse and visualize data and insights.

Workplace: Milan, Palazzo Mezzanotte

Key Responsibilities


Data Management: Analysis, quality assurance, integration of data collected from the community to produce solid data sets usable for internal and external analysis, visualization and future machine learning operations. Valorization and integration of unstructured data, classification and extraction of relevant information from different data sources. Ensure data quality and maintenance of data assets (internal DB) by implementing best practices in data management and governance.
Data Analysis & Insights: Analyze datasets to identify trends, patterns, and opportunities for business improvement. Provide actionable insights based on data in order to monitor and enhance business performance.
Reporting & Visualization: Create and maintain dashboards, reports and visualizations (Excel, Power BI, …) to communicate key metrics and insights effectively.
Support on Product & Market development:
Build specific, sector-oriented knowledge for the different products/solutions to be developed or tested with current and prospect clients Europe-wide
Help to identify market needs and opportunities through data analytics and provide actionable potential offer/product and sales activities (outbound)
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (sales, marketing, product) to support the development of new products/solutions and maintenance of existing products/solutions in line with client requirements and data mapping
Contribution on revenue management: enhance data management and strategy to continuously improve and maintain revenues (including on a recurring basis) with existing and new clients.
Client success: support the team to ensure that the service/product is successfully delivered to the clients. Identify upselling/cross-selling opportunities.

Candidate Profile/ Key Skills


Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Mathematics, Management Engineering, Economics, or a related field.
Proven experience (at least 2y) in data management, analytics and insight generation. Experience in a role to support business development, strategy, innovation or sales is a plus.
Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills with the ability to analyze complex data and provide actionable insights.
Proficiency in data analysis tools and languages, including Excel Power Queries, R, SQL and Python) and data visualization tools like Power BI.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to clearly and concisely present complex information to non-analytical stakeholders.
Ability to leverage internal and external relationships, drive forward projects and provide clear business input into functional requirements.
Proactive attitude, precision and attention to detail, ability to adapt in a dynamic and cross-functional environment.
Collaborative, open, pragmatic, team-worker, customer oriented and data driven approach to work.
Fluency in English


We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate against individuals on the basis of race, gender, age, citizenship, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, disability, or any other legally protected factor. We value the unique talents of all our people, who come from diverse backgrounds with different personal experiences and points of view and we are committed to providing an environment of mutual respect.

Additional Information

This job description is only describing the main activities within a certain role and is not exhaustive. It does not prevent to add more tasks, projects.

Title: Fraud Data Analyst - Barcelona
Description:
Please note that this opportunity requires relocation to our Barcelona office.

About Us

Satispay began by rethinking the simple act of a payment to remove the friction from our daily routines. But we didn't stop there. Today, we are building a complete financial platform designed to empower people and concretely improve their lives.

By giving our 6 million users a clear, open path to pay, save, and invest, we are evolving into the definitive destination for every financial need.

What You'll Be Doing

As our Fraud Data Analyst, you'll be the person who secures the future of digital payments by architecting sophisticated real-time defense strategies.

Here's What Your Day-to-day Will Look Like


Architect Real-Time Strategies – You will be responsible for our real-time decisioning engine, designing and deploying logic that combines ML scores with velocity features to make millisecond decisions.
Precision Rule Development – Translate complex fraud patterns into high-performing rules, optimizing the balance between False Positive Rates (FPR) and Gross Fraud Loss.
Deconstruct Payment Fraud – Proactively hunt for emerging schemes (ATO, social engineering) and turn these insights into end-to-end mitigation strategies.
Optimize the Decisioning Stack – Partner with Product and Engineering to define analytical requirements for new features and third-party data signals.
Calibrate ML & Heuristics – Work with Data Science to operationalize machine learning models, determining how to best "wrap" model scores with heuristic rules.
Champion Frictionless UX – Analyze security measures to identify unnecessary hurdles, designing dynamic friction strategies for a seamless user experience.
Strategic Performance Reporting – Monitor rule efficacy and portfolio health, presenting data-driven recommendations to senior leadership to evolve our risk appetite.


Expect challenges, collaboration, and the freedom to bring your ideas to life in a fast-moving and supportive environment. Things change quickly here, so be ready to adapt, take initiative, and shape your role as we grow.

Who We're Looking For

We need a problem-solver who loves teamwork and gets things done. If you're curious and ready for real ownership, you'll fit in! Does this sound like you?


Experience – You have between 3 and 7 years of professional experience, specifically within the risk, payments, or credit sectors.
Technical Proficiency – You are highly skilled in SQL and Python for data analysis and strategy development.
Domain Expertise – You have a solid understanding of payment fraud dynamics and experience working with real-time decisioning environments.
Communication – You possess excellent communication skills and are fluent in English.
Nice to Have – Experience with Machine Learning, Data Science, PySpark, or GraphQL knowledge is a significant plus.


CareAbout: how we support your impact

About

We move fast, and evolution never stops. It's a fun ride, but it can be challenging. To make sure our people truly thrive, we're committed to making their lives easier, both in the office and out in the world. That's why we created CareAbout:


❤️ Health (Private insurance for you and your family, psychological support with Serenis, mental health workshops)
💰 Financial resources (Stock Option Plan, Meal vouchers, Relocation support if you're moving countries)
⚙️ Growth and development (Professional development programs, Internal mobility, Language courses with Preply)
🌱 Flexibility (Unlimited PTO, Hybrid working policy*, Flexible working hours)
👨‍👩‍👧 Family (Enhanced parental leave, Additional leave for child sickness)
We embrace three days per week in-office (Tuesday and Thursday + 1 of your choice), with the option to request extra remote time.


Equal Opportunity Employer

At Satispay, we're proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and inclusion, welcoming individuals of all backgrounds. This opportunity is open to everyone, regardless - for instance - of race, colour, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, and national origin. Join us in a workplace where everyone belongs!

Learn more about us

Our values and pillars aren't just fancy words on a page - they really shape everything we do. Explore them here.

By submitting this application, I acknowledge that I have read and understood the content of the Privacy Policy

Title: Junior Data Analyst - Stage
Description:
In SDG hai l’opportunità di diventare un esperto di Big Data & Analytics e di entrare a far parte di una delle società più all’avanguardia d’Europa in questo ambito. Potrai partecipare a diversi progetti nazionali e internazionali lavorando in team giovani e dinamici. Vengono effettuate valutazioni periodiche di performance e acquisizione di skills che ti permetteranno di fare velocemente carriera nella nostra realtà. Avrai inoltre modo di costruire il tuo career path personalizzato scegliendo tra diversi percorsi. Partendo da un livello base, attraverso training, coaching, mentoring, e un approccio never-stop-learning diventerai un esperto nella progettazione e sviluppo di practices con le quali far adottare ai nostri clienti un’ottica data driven.

Your Challenges:

Acquisire una conoscenza dei big data & analytics a 360°: data architecture, data management, data visualization e data analysis;
Sviluppare hard skills nell’utilizzo delle tecnologie di business intelligence e soft skills per relazionarsi con il cliente e il proprio team di lavoro;
Capacità di muoversi e interagire in un ambiente internazionale, rapido e dinamico assumendosi gradualmente maggiori responsabilità e autonomia nei tasks;

Requirements:

Technology attitude: SQL, VBA, R, Python, tecnologie di Business Intelligence, Data manipulation, Data Management sono solo il punto di partenza ma non preoccuparti se la tua conoscenza è a un livello base: abbiamo un Learning Center per renderti velocemente un Data Cruncher.
Team player: un buon giocatore di squadra è una persona altruista, dinamica, entusiasta, resiliente e positiva. Sono elementi alla base dei Valori SDG e lavoriamo per far crescere una cultura dei valori a tutti i livelli.
Capacità di elaborare informazioni aziendali complesse e di presentarle con sensibilità agli stakeholder aziendali.
Conoscenza lingua inglese: B1/B2 (verrà testata in sede di colloquio)

Rock your future with SDG:

Academy interne e centri di eccellenza qualificati con possibilità di ottenere certificazioni per i tools più utilizzati nel campo dei big data & analytics: Qlik, PowerBI, Tableau, Microstrategy, SAP Analytics, AWS Redshift, Oracle DB, SQL Server, Google Bigquery, Snowflake etc.;
Never stop learning: formazione continua per tutto l’arco della carriera con 80 ore di training iniziale e successiva attività di coaching e mentoring. Valutazioni semestrali del potenziale e della performance.

Title: Data Analyst - Procurement, Italy
Description:
About Us

We are a community of visionary innovators, dedicated to providing pioneering software and consultancy services to financial institutions, trading firms, central banks, governments, and corporations around the world. We strive to simplify the way people work. We do that by providing workflow and process automation software, as well as providing real-time data and business intelligence to help people make better decisions. We are 13,000+ employees, we operate globally with 80+ global offices, and we serve over 4,800+ customers worldwide.

We are looking for a talented and motivated Data Analyst - Procurement to join the Procurement function and support data-driven decision making, acting as a key analytical partner for Procurement stakeholders, with a strong focus on data analysis, operational intelligence, and reporting.

The role requires a highly analytical professional capable of working closely with the Procurement team on procurement and vendor-related datasets, delivering insights, and contributing to performance monitoring, governance, and process optimization.

The successful candidate will play a key role in transforming procurement and operational data into actionable insights, supporting decision-making, efficiency, and continuous improvement across procurement processes and the vendor lifecycle.

Learn more at www.iongroup.com.

Your Role

Your key duties and responsibilities


Act as a key data analysis reference within the Procurement function, supporting stakeholders in monitoring performance and driving insights
Perform advanced data analysis on procurement and vendor-related datasets, identifying trends, inconsistencies, risks, and improvement opportunities
Analyze data from key source systems and contribute to the development of structured data models to improve usability, traceability, and reporting accuracy
Support Procurement stakeholders by transforming data into meaningful insights and decision-support reporting
Design, maintain, and improve reporting frameworks, dashboards, KPIs, and data quality controls to support procurement performance and governance
Monitor procurement KPIs and vendor performance metrics, identifying areas for optimization
Ensure data quality, integrity, and consistency across multiple enterprise systems (e.g. ERP, procurement tools, vendor management platforms)
Support business analysis and data-related initiatives across Procurement, Finance, and IT systems
Collaborate closely with Procurement stakeholders and cross-functionally with Finance, Risk, Compliance, IT, and Data teams
Contribute to process improvements by leveraging data insights and supporting automation initiatives within Procurement
Support audits and reporting needs related to procurement data, ensuring accuracy and traceability


Your Skills, Experience, And Qualifications Required


Master’s degree in Economics, Engineering, Data Analytics, Business Analytics, Statistics, or a related field
2-5 years of experience in data analysis, reporting, or business intelligence roles
Strong analytical mindset with proven experience in data analysis, KPI monitoring, and reporting
Experience working with structured datasets and business systems (e.g. ERP)
Advanced Excel skills and strong proficiency in data manipulation and reporting; Power BI or similar BI platforms strongly preferred
Familiarity with data models, data quality frameworks, reconciliation logic, and system integrations
Exposure to procurement, vendor management, or supply chain data/environments is considered an advantage
Strong attention to data quality, controls, governance, and operational risk management
Good stakeholder management and communication skills, with the ability to work closely with business functions
Structured, pragmatic, and solution-oriented approach
Ability to operate autonomously, prioritize effectively, and manage multiple activities and deadlines
Excellent Italiana and English knowledge


What We Offer


Permanent employment contract.
International and highly dynamic environment.
Opportunity to work at the intersection of Procurement, Data Analytics, Operational Governance, and Process Transformation.
Exposure to global stakeholders and enterprise-scale systems and processes.


Location:

Milan.

Important Notes

According to the Italian Law (L.68/99) please note that candidates from the disability list will be given priority.

Title: Digital Analyst
Description:
Siamo il Gruppo Miroglio, una realtà internazionale fondata ad Alba nel 1947 fatta di persone con un forte spirito imprenditoriale e lo sguardo rivolto al futuro senza dimenticare il passato.

Ogni giorno agiamo con passione e facciamo accadere le cose, esplorando il mondo della moda in tutte le sue forme: dal fashion retail con i nostri 10 brand di abbigliamento (tra cui Trussardi, Elena Mirò, Motivi, Oltre e Fiorella Rubino), alla stampa transfer con Sublitex, fino alla logistica integrata e al supply chain management.

La Tua Opportunità:

In questo ruolo avrai l’obiettivo di analizzare e monitorare i dati comportamentali ed economici relativi agli e-commerce dei brand del gruppo. Aiuterai i brand nella comprensione delle micro e macro-dinamiche del canale e supporterai strategie di business e di ottimizzazione del customer journey.

Il ruolo è a diretto riporto dell’E-commerce & Analytics Manager.

La tua Missione:


Analisi del comportamento degli utenti sulle property online (5 siti E-Commerce del gruppo), attraverso strumenti di Web Analytics, e identificazione di insight.
Verifica della corretta implementazione dei tracciamenti di Web Analytics necessari per la misurazione delle performance del sito.
Analisi dei dati e degli obiettivi raggiunti in ambito e-commerce, Merchandising, Visual Merchandising, Digital Production, Digital Media, Email Marketing e CRM.
Condivisione di raccomandazioni a supporto delle decisioni di business, integrando un punto di vista analitico al contesto di mercato e di brand.
Supporto analitico nella costruzione del budget e-commerce.
Supporto nel set up di analisi e dashboard da parte di stakeholder del team. Digital & Omnichannel: team E-commerce, Merchandising, Digital Media e CRM.
Creazione di modelli di business volti alla comprensione delle performance di canale.


Le tue Skills:


Laurea Magistrale in ambito STEM (Statistica, Ingegneria, Matematica o simili).
2+ anni di esperienza nel ruolo di Analyst nell'area Digital.
Padronanza nell'utilizzo di strumenti di web analytics e data visualization.
Conoscenza e utilizzo della suite Microsoft Office, in particolare Microsoft Excel.
La conoscenza di almeno uno strumento di data science (R, SAS, Stack Amazon o simili) è un plus.
Passione per il mercato Digital, le sue innovazioni e tecnologie in generale.
Forte mindset analitico.
Ottime capacità relazionali e comunicative.
Abilità nel lavorare con team cross-funzionali.
Propensione alla leadership.
Inglese fluente.


Cosa ti offriremo:


Un'azienda giovane e dinamica che crede nel talento e mette le persone al centro
L’opportunità di crescere e avere un reale impatto, in un contesto fortemente meritocratico basato su performance management e obiettivi chiari e definiti
Onboarding specifico per il tuo ruolo, dove verrai formata/o sul nostro business, sui nostri processi e tools
Formazione continua sia in aula che online
Convenzioni aziendali e iniziative di well-being (servizio di supporto psicologico, flessibilità oraria, corsi di yoga e pilates, e molto altro)
Asilo aziendale, con orari e periodi di apertura in linea con quelli aziendali
Sconto almeno del 40% sui capi di tutti i nostri brand


Sede di lavoro: ibrida tra HQ di Alba (CN) e Milano con possibilità di svolgere smart working

Crediamo nel valore delle persone e della diversità in tutte le sue forme. Guardiamo al talento, non alle etichette, e accogliamo con rispetto chiunque voglia mettersi in gioco, garantendo pari opportunità indipendentemente da genere, età, identità o background. Se hai bisogno di supporto durante il processo di selezione, siamo a tua disposizione

Title: Junior Process Analyst
Description:
Italmondo Spa, fondata nel 1953, Headquarter del Gruppo ITLM con sede ad Arluno (MI), è leader in Italia e in Europa nel settore dei trasporti e della logistica integrata da 70 anni.




Italmondo è il cuore di un gruppo multimodale che eroga una molteplicità di servizi a valore aggiunto (logistica integrata, trasporto su gomma, marittimo e aereo, soluzioni di e-logistics e di e-commerce, consulenza digitale) ed opera in Europa, Nord Africa ed Est Asiatico




Presente con oltre 25 sedi dirette nel mondo, il Gruppo impiega oltre 1500 persone tra dipendenti diretti e collaboratori che vivono una realtà di respiro internazionale, giovane, dinamica e in costante crescita dove la tradizione si fonde con l’innovazione.




Siamo alla ricerca di una risorsa junior motivata e curiosa da inserire nel nostro team Processi.




La risorsa ideale ha una formazione in Ingegneria Gestionale o discipline affini, con interesse per l'analisi e l’ottimizzazione dei processi aziendali.




Il ruolo:

Supporto nell’analisi dei dati per individuare aree di miglioramento nei flussi operativi
Partecipazione al ridisegno dei processi aziendali, in collaborazione con i team operativi
Mappatura dei processi, stesura di procedure e documentazione operativa
Supporto alla creazione di presentazioni efficaci e materiali formativi chiari e strutturati per la diffusione interna delle procedure
Collaborazione a progetti di miglioramento continuo, contribuendo con idee e soluzioni concrete




Requisiti:

Laurea in Ingegneria Gestionale, Economia o affini
Interesse per i temi di organizzazione aziendale e ottimizzazione dei processi
Ottima padronanza di Excel, PowerPoint e capacità di creare presentazioni chiare e professionali
Esperienza (anche accademica) nella redazione di manuali operativi o materiali formativi
Conoscenza base (preferibile) delle metodologie Lean, Kaizen o Six Sigma
Attitudine analitica, precisione, autonomia e voglia di imparare




Cosa offriamo:

Un ambiente dinamico e collaborativo
Affiancamento da parte di figure esperte e formazione on-the-job
Opportunità di contribuire concretamente al miglioramento dei processi aziendali
Possibilità di sviluppare competenze tecniche e comunicative trasversali




Se cambiamento, efficienza e formazione sono i tuoi fattori guida, potresti essere la persona che cerchiamo.

Title: Jr. Data Strategist - Internship
Description:
Cheil Italy, the data-driven creativity Agency under the Samsung Group, is looking for a curious, analytical and AI-oriented Data Strategist Intern to join our Performance & Strategy Team.




This internship is designed for students eager to gain hands-on experience in digital performance analysis, data interpretation and strategic planning within a dynamic and data-driven agency environment.




Your Role




You will support the team in the strategy, development and monitoring of performance-driven communication activities for our main clients.




You will contribute to:

• Supporting the execution and monitoring of multi-channel activities, tracking performance against objectives and key metrics.

• Analysing data to extract insights and support strategic recommendations.

• Assisting in the preparation of reports and presentations for internal and external stakeholders.

• Contributing to the creation of dashboards, graphs and data visualizations.

• Supporting the setup and optimization of tracking and reporting processes.




Requirements




• Academic background in Marketing, Economics, Data Science, Statistics, Management Engineering or related fields.




• Strong interest in AI and data innovation: curiosity about AI applications in performance analysis, automation, predictive models or data-driven strategy, with a proactive attitude in exploring AI tools.

• Strong analytical mindset and attention to detail.

• Good knowledge of Excel.

• Familiarity (academic or personal) with Data Visualization tools such as Power BI, Tableau or similar.

• Basic understanding of digital performance metrics and KPIs.

• Good level of English.

• Team player mindset, curiosity and willingness to learn in a fast-paced environment.




Place of work: Milan




About Cheil




Cheil Italia Srl is a subsidiary of Cheil Worldwide Inc.




We redefine the way brands connect and engage with consumers.




Data is our foundation, technology is our building block. We drive our clients to address change creating 360° communication projects mixing advertising, digital marketing, retail and experiential marketing.




Our ethical approach




We are a certified Agency with the following certifications:




• Certified Quality System – ISO9001




• Certified Anti-Bribery – ISO37001




• Certified Carbon Footprint - ISO14064




• Certified Gender-Equality – UNI 125:2022




• Occupational Health & Safety – ISO45001




We are an equal opportunity employer




All aspects of employment including the decision to hire, promote, discipline, or discharge, will be based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, age, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression.

Title: Data Analyst - Analytics Engineering
Description:
About Us

Satispay began by rethinking the simple act of a payment to remove the friction from our daily routines. But we didn’t stop there. Today, we are building a complete financial platform designed to empower people and concretely improve their lives. By giving our 6 million users a clear, open path to pay, save, and invest, we are evolving into the definitive destination for every financial need.

What You'll Be Doing

As our Data Analyst - Analytics Engineering, you’ll be the person who drives our data strategy and enhances decision-making by developing scalable data assets and AI-powered workflows. You will join the Growth & Marketing (G&M) B2C Analytics team, which sits at the heart of our department with the mission to put intelligence first in every decision. Here's what your day-to-day will look like:


Lead Design Data Architecture – Drive the development of the Data Mesh layer by designing robust data models and building pipelines that integrate into the company's federated data strategy, ensuring scalable and governed data ownership.
Define AI Agentic Workflows – Design and implement AI-powered agentic workflows for data transformation and exploration, accelerating analytical capabilities and enabling self-service for key stakeholders.
Build High-Impact Visualisation Tools – Define key metrics and develop dashboards and reports (using tools like Hex or Looker) that communicate analytical insights effectively.
Drive Decision-Making Through Data – Analyse complex datasets to identify patterns impacting the consumer funnel (Acquisition, Engagement, Retention, Monetisation) and partner with Marketing Managers to maximise ROI.
Partner with Key Stakeholders – Act as a strategic partner for Marketing, Finance, Operations, and Product, bridging the gap between technical data and business goals.
Drive Testing Initiatives – Own the end-to-end testing pipeline, from opportunity identification to experiment design and recommendation delivery.


Who We're Looking For

We need a problem-solver who loves teamwork and gets things done. If you're curious and ready for real ownership, you'll fit in! Does this sound like you?


Relevant Experience – 5+ years in data-related roles (Data Engineering, Analytics, BI) with at least 3 years of hands-on experience in high-volume or big data environments.
Technical Proficiency – Strong command of SQL, dbt, and Python. Experience with Git and notebook-based analytics (e.g., Jupyter) is a plus.
Data Modelling & Mesh Expertise – Hands-on experience in data modelling, ETL, data governance, and Data Mesh implementation at scale.
AI Fluency – Proven ability to work with AI tools, including prompting and context management, or interacting with agents programmatically via APIs.
Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills – Comfortable with ambiguity, able to break down complex problems into focused workstreams and deliver evidence-based answers.
Stakeholder Management & Communication – Able to independently lead initiatives across diverse business domains and translate technical findings into clear, actionable recommendations.
Digital Consumer Lifecycle Knowledge – Solid understanding of consumer lifecycle (Acquisition, Activation, Retention, Churn) and user economics (ARPU, CAC, LTV).


CareAbout: how we support your impact

About

We move fast, and evolution never stops. It’s a fun ride, but it can be challenging. To make sure our people truly thrive, we’re committed to making their lives easier, both in the office and out in the world. That’s why we created CareAbout:

❤️ Health (Private insurance for you and your family, psychological support with Serenis, mental health workshops)

💰 Financial resources (Stock Option Plan, Meal vouchers, Relocation support if you’re moving countries)

⚙️ Growth and development (Professional development programs, Internal mobility, Language courses with Preply)

🌱 Flexibility (Unlimited PTO, Hybrid working policy*, Flexible working hours)

👨‍👩‍👧 Family (Enhanced parental leave, Additional leave for child sickness)


We embrace three days per week in-office (Tuesday and Thursday + 1 of your choice), with the option to request extra remote time.


Equal Opportunity Employer

At Satispay, we're proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and inclusion, welcoming individuals of all backgrounds. This opportunity is open to everyone, regardless - for instance - of race, colour, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, and national origin. Join us in a workplace where everyone belongs!

Learn More About Us

Our values and pillars aren’t just fancy words on a page - they really shape everything we do. Explore them here.

By submitting this application, I acknowledge that I have read and understood the content of the Privacy Policy

Title: Data Science Specialist
Description:
Job description:



Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities.

 

 

JOB PURPOSE


We are seeking a Data Science Specialist to join the Data & Analytics Team within IT. Based in our Milan HQ, the role focuses on designing and industrializing AI solutions for customer personalization and recommendation systems. The ideal candidate combines strong technical skills with the ability to coordinate small external development teams and work across multiple IT and business functions on complex enterprise programs.

 


RESPONSIBILITIES

 

Design and deploy personalization models and recommendation engines, translating business requirements into scalable, data-driven solutions.
Lead the full lifecycle of data science projects — from prototyping to production — ensuring alignment with enterprise platform standards.
Coordinate small teams of external developers, overseeing code quality, timelines, and deliverables.
Collaborate on cross-IT programs, managing dependencies with other teams (Data Platform, Integration, Digital, CRM) and business stakeholders.
Build and maintain scalable data pipelines on Databricks and Azure to support model training, serving, and continuous improvement.
Monitor model performance and proactively identify opportunities to enhance accuracy and business impact.
Contribute to ML Ops best practices and reusable frameworks within the Data Science area.

 

 

KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS

 

Master’s degree in a quantitative field (Statistics, Computer Science, Machine Learning, Data Science, Mathematics, Engineering) or equivalent experience.
4+ years of industry experience in data science, with a strong focus on personalization and recommendation systems.
Advanced proficiency in Python and PySpark; solid knowledge of SQL.
Hands-on experience with recommendation models (collaborative filtering, content-based, hybrid) and personalization algorithms at scale.
Strong experience with Databricks (MLflow, Feature Store, Model Serving) and Azure.
Familiarity with ML Ops practices (CI/CD for ML, model monitoring, automated retraining).
Experience managing external development teams and ensuring delivery quality.
Proven ability to work on complex, cross-functional programs in international environments.
Experience with Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) is preferred.
Previous experience in Fashion & Luxury or management consulting is a plus.
Excellent communication skills; ability to bridge technical and business language.
Fluency in Italian and English, written and spoken.

 

 

Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth.
Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

Title: Junior Research Analyst
Description:
🚀 Unisciti al Team degli Osservatori Digital Innovation!




Hai passione per l'Innovazione Digitale e vuoi metterti in gioco in un contesto di ricerca dinamico e all’avanguardia? Gli Osservatori Digital Innovation della School of Management del Politecnico di Milano ti offrono un’opportunità unica di crescita professionale in un ambiente stimolante e altamente qualificato!




Dal 1999, siamo un punto di riferimento per l'Innovazione Digitale in Italia, integrando ricerca applicata, comunicazione, aggiornamento continuo e networking. Oggi, siamo alla ricerca di un/una Junior Research Analyst per supportare le nostre attività di ricerca nei seguenti ambiti:




Arte&Cultura/Turismo
AI
AgriFood
Logistica
5G




In qualità di Junior Research Analyst, avrai l'opportunità di:




🔍 Analizzare la letteratura nazionale e internazionale su temi di innovazione digitale

🎤 Partecipare a interviste con il top management di aziende, sintetizzando i contenuti emersi

📊 Realizzare studi di caso sulle principali iniziative nel settore

📝 Supportare la stesura di survey e l'elaborazione dei risultati

📅 Contribuire all’organizzazione di eventi e workshop tematici

📣 Gestire attività di comunicazione, inclusi social media e newsletter

🤝 Mantenere relazioni con la nostra community di esperti, aziende e istituzioni




Cerchiamo una persona curiosa, smart e intraprendente che possieda:




- Laurea Magistrale in Ingegneria Gestionale, Economia, Management o ambiti affini ai temi di ricerca

- Conoscenza madrelingua della lingua italiana e ottima conoscenza della lingua inglese (sia scritta che parlata)

- Competenze avanzate in Office (Excel, PowerPoint)

- Passione per l'innovazione digitale e la ricerca applicata

- Capacità analitiche e di sintesi dei dati, con spirito critico e attenzione ai dettagli

- Proattività e spirito di iniziativa

- Capacità di lavorare in team e di gestire le relazioni interpersonali




Entrando nel nostro team, potrai godere di una stage retribuito con l'opportunità di lavorare in un ambiente giovane, stimolante e altamente innovativo, con accesso a:




🌟 Esperienza su temi di innovazione digitale di eccellenza

🌟 Formazione continua e personalizzata

🌟 Networking professionale con colleghi, aziende e istituzioni di alto livello

🌟 Un ambiente di lavoro dinamico e orientato alla crescita




Non perdere questa occasione, candidati ora e inizia il tuo percorso con noi! 🚀

Title: Impiegato/a Amministrativo/a Gdo
Description:
Realtà operante nella distribuzione sul territorio Gdo inserisce risorsa Impiegato/a ufficio amministrativo per attività operative legate alla gestione clientela e supporto attività sede.

La società attiva nel settore della distribuzione presso la Grande Distribuzione Organizzata sta cercando un Impiegato/a per l'ufficio amministrativo. Il ruolo prevede svolgere attività operative legate alla gestione della clientela e fornire supporto alle operazioni interne dell'azienda.

Attività Previste:


Gestione della documentazione amministrativa
Supporto nella compilazione di report e analisi
Elaborazione e archiviazione di dati
Coordinamento delle attività amministrative quotidiane
Collaborazione con altri dipartimenti per la gestione delle pratiche amministrative


Requisiti:


Conoscenza delle procedure amministrative
Capacità di organizzazione e gestione del tempo
Competenze informatiche (MS Office, in particolare Excel)
Precisione e attenzione al dettaglio
Capacità di lavorare in team


Offerta


Proposta di inserimento con contratto di apprendistato
Presenza di un riferimento interno per le attività assegnate
Avvio graduale delle mansioni con supporto interno

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
About BizAway

Here at BizAway, we Deliver the Future of Travel. 😎

We are a solid international company with strong ambitions and great expertise. With a focus on sustainability 🌱, on a daily basis we support companies enabling them to improve their travel management through our constantly evolving services and solutions, always characterized by our tech attitude and smart and innovative processes. 🚀

We know that success comes from People and deserves to be recognized.👫Proactivity and

Reliability, Kind collaboration, and communication are the core values of our Solution Culture.

If you like challenges and would love to be part of one of the fastest-growing B2B scale-ups, then BizAway is the company you have been looking for. 🤩

We are looking for

We are looking for a driven and enthusiastic Data Analyst (m/w/d) , who desires to contribute to the growth and success of our Data & Analytics Team.

Your role in BizAway


You manage and improve our current reporting system, supporting all internal needs for Data visualization of data findings through charts, graphs, and dashboards to make our data understandable.
You learn all aspects of the travel industry from Finance, Products, Sales and Service/Operations perspective, translating data into actionable insights resulting in verifiable reporting.
By having domain expertise in our industry, you engage with Business and Strategy stakeholders to help define KPIs, including how data will be captured, shared, and leveraged across our departments.
You contribute to creating the base foundations of a comprehensive source of truth through data modeling actions


Your Basic Qualifications


Previously worked in a Tech Company
Demonstrated experience with Product Analytics tools (eg: Amplitude, Mixpanel, Pendo, Google Analytics)
Demonstrated experience with BI Data Visualization tools (Qlik preferred)
Data analysis, presentation, and visualization experience
Strong communication skills required
Ability to work alone or in a team as required
Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Engineering, Economics or a related field is preferred
English proficiency (written and spoken level B2)


We are also interested in


Knowledge of programming languages such as Python
Experience with ETL tools
Understanding of AI/ML concepts


Our offer

📄 Contract type: Permanent

🕓 Working hours: Full-time – 40h/week, from Monday to Friday

🏢 Hybrid setting, flexible working policy, and great offices in Europe

💰 Salary: Starting from 2nd level and above, with a salary range of €40K- €45K in accordance with the National

Collective Agreement for the Commerce sector (CCNL Commercio)

💼 Equity in the company (stock options plan)

✈️ A seat on a scale-up with skyrocketing growth

📈 Development of your entrepreneurial spirit, having the chance to implement real-impact business decision

🌍Multicultural and international team

🙌Collaborative and smart environment to work and learn

🍻Free coffee to kick-start your day and free beers to celebrate together

BizAway guarantees equal employment opportunities for all individuals, in compliance with Art. 3 of the Italian Constitution, Legislative Decree 198/2006 (Equal Opportunities Code), Law 162/2021, and EU Directive 2006/54/EC. The selection process is open without any discrimination on the basis of gender, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, ethnic origin, personal beliefs, or religion. Candidates are invited to review the privacy notice pursuant to Art. 13 of EU Regulation 2016/679 and Legislative Decree 196/2003, as amended by Legislative Decree 101/2018.

Title: Impiegato/a Data Entry - Servizi per Clientela Privata e Aziendale

Realtà operativa specializzata nell’erogazione di servizi rivolti a clientela privata e aziendale ricerca una risorsa da inserire come Impiegato/a Data Entry a supporto delle attività amministrative e operative.

Diploma di scuola secondaria superiore

Attitudine al lavoro in team

Inserimento con contratto a tempo determinato

Orario di lavoro full-time, articolato su turni settimanali

Attività svolta in contesto strutturato

Affiancamento operativo e formazione iniziale

Title: Junior Data Analyst
Description:
Questa posizione è in Regione Lombardia, l'ente che guida l'innovazione e la digitalizzazione del territorio lombardo.




Riassunto dell’opportunità da parte della Joinrs AI: Regione Lombardia cerca uno/una Specialista Junior Data Analyst per trasformare i dati in decisioni strategiche. Lavorerai su dataset multidisciplinari per monitorare l'efficacia delle politiche pubbliche, creando dashboard e report che guideranno il futuro del territorio. È l'opportunità perfetta per neolaureati magistrali in ambiti quantitativi/statistici residenti in Lombardia.

Offerta: apprendistato professionalizzante, smart working e 36 ore settimanali per un equilibrio vita-lavoro reale.




Il processo di selezione sarà interamente gestito da Regione Lombardia.

--




Descrizione




Metti i dati al servizio del cambiamento pubblico!




Valorizziamo le competenze, ascoltiamo le idee e crediamo che ogni persona porti un contributo unico al nostro lavoro.

Entrare in Regione significa far parte di una nuova generazione che rinnova lo sguardo, modernizza i processi e accompagna l’Ente Regione verso il futuro. Con Regione Lombardia contribuirai concretamente al benessere della comunità e ad avere un ruolo attivo nei processi di cambiamento del territorio.

Siamo alla ricerca di una nuova risorsa da inserire come Specialista Junior Data Analyst.

Collaborerai con diverse Direzioni Generali di Regione Lombardia, contribuendo alla gestione, interpretazione e valorizzazione dei dati utili a programmare, monitorare e valutare le attività dell’Ente.




Cosa farai




Elaborazione, analisi e interpretazione di dati utili alla programmazione e valutazione delle politiche pubbliche.
Produzione di report, grafici, indicatori e strumenti di sintesi per supportare le decisioni delle Direzioni.
Supporto alla gestione dei sistemi informativi e dei flussi di dati.
Attività di monitoraggio e valutazione di progetti, bandi e iniziative regionali.
Lavorerai su dataset diversi e multidisciplinari, ampliando subito il tuo bagaglio analitico.
Avrai l’occasione di partecipare a progetti strategici che incidono direttamente sulle politiche pubbliche.
Potrai proporre idee nuove per migliorare strumenti, dashboard, modelli e processi decisionali.




Cosa troverai in Regione Lombardia




Un modello innovativo di ingresso nella PA: apprendistato professionalizzante con la possibilità di proseguire il percorso all’interno dell’Ente.
Stabilità professionale e, fin da subito, inquadramento giuridico più elevato (Funzionario ed Elevata Qualificazione).
Smart working e 36 ore settimanali per garantire equilibrio vita/lavoro.
Crescita professionale graduale e guidata, con attenzione alle tue attitudini e potenzialità.
Riconoscimento economico al raggiungimento degli obiettivi.
Un ambiente collaborativo, basato sull’ascolto, sul confronto aperto e sul supporto reciproco.
Percorsi di formazione continua (almeno 60 ore l’anno) su competenze della PA e contenuti specifici per la posizione.




Requisiti




Laurea magistrale coerente con ambiti quantitativi, statistici, gestionali o affini (come previste dal bando);
età non superiore a 30 anni;
residenza nel territorio della Regione Lombardia;
conoscenze di base in analisi dei dati e utilizzo di strumenti informatici dedicati;
capacità di produrre report chiari e di interpretare dataset complessi;
buone competenze relazionali, flessibilità e orientamento al lavoro di squadra.




Come candidarsi




La selezione avviene tramite bando pubblico, che prevede una prova scritta e un colloquio orale. Per partecipare è necessario presentare domanda attraverso il bando ufficiale pubblicato sul portale di Regione Lombardia.

Title: Data-analist
Description:
Consultant- Data Analyst (NL) - Exsolvæ – Brussel en omgeving (op locatie)




Over Exsolvæ

Exsolvæ is een Brussels consultancybureau gespecialiseerd in Data en Artificial Intelligence. Wij begeleiden onze partners bij complexe, vaak unieke uitdagingen via consultance, audits en het ontwikkelen van op maat gemaakte oplossingen. Onze aanpak is bewust holistisch: we laten Data Engineering, Advanced Analytics en AI samenkomen, want wij geloven erin dat daar de échte impact ontstaat.

Bij Exsolvæ noemen we onze consultants Solvers; gepassioneerde professionals die met de nieuwste technologieën werken, blijven leren, kennis delen, en gedreven zijn om duurzame oplossingen met écht resultaat te leveren.




Over de rol

Als Data Analyst speel je een sleutelrol in het omzetten van data naar inzichten die het verschil maken bij strategische beslissingen. Je werkt nauw samen met business- en technische teams om sterke datamodellen te ontwerpen, krachtige dashboards te bouwen, en ervoor te zorgen dat data binnen de organisatie correct, veilig en efficiënt wordt verwerkt.




Wat ga je doen?

Datamodellen ontwerpen, ontwikkelen en optimaliseren die de business en strategie ondersteunen
Power BI dashboards bouwen en uitbouwen die complexe data omzetten naar heldere, bruikbare inzichten
Werken met grote datasets, met aandacht voor performance, schaalbaarheid en snelheid
Data-transformaties optimaliseren via Power Query, DAX en SQL best practices
Databricks inzetten voor data preparation, transformatie en modellering
Werken met data in cloudomgevingen zoals Azure en/of AWS om analyses en rapporteringen op te zetten
Data security (RlS/OLS) implementeren en beheren; de juiste toegang voor de juiste mensen
Kwantitatieve en statistische analyses uitvoeren om inzichten te genereren die onderbouwde beslissingen ondersteunen
Bijdragen aan data-standaarden, governance en best practices binnen de organisatie
Mee bouwen aan datakwaliteit, consistentie en betrouwbaarheid




Wat breng je mee?

4+ jaar ervaring als Data Analyst of in een gelijkwaardige rol
Sterke expertise in Power BI, zowel in dashboard design als in performance optimalisatie
Gevorderde kennis van SQL en DAX, met focus of efficiënte queries en berekeningen
Hands-on ervaring met Databricks
Ervaring in Azure- en/of AWS-omgevingen
Bewezen ervaring met tabular models en high-performance analytics
Solide kennis van datamodellering (star schema, dimensional modeling)
Ervaring met role-based security (RLS/OLS)
Een analytische mindset en een gestructureerde aanpak van problemen
Sterke communicatieve skills; je kan complexe data vertalen naar heldere verhalen
Vloeiend Engels en Nederlands en idealiter spreek je ook een woordje Frans (B1/B2)




Waarom Exsolvæ?

Werken aan projecten met écht impact
Een innovatieve omgeving waarin leren en kennisdeling centraal staan
Volop kansen om jezelf verder te ontwikkelen
Hybride werken; flexibel tussen kantoor en thuis
Een competitief salaris met een mooi pakket aan voordelen
Klinkt dit als een uitdaging die bij jou past? Laat het me weten en dan vertel ik je er graag meer over!

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Freelance Project: Data Analyst – Reporting




Start: ASAP

Work Regime: Full‑time, hybrid

Onsite: Wednesday & Thursday

Location: Mechelen region

Languages: English (mandatory)




Role

We are looking for a Data Analyst to strengthen a reporting team and support a high‑priority data project. You will act as a bridge between business and data teams, translating requirements into data‑driven insights and reporting solutions.




Responsibilities

Take ownership of ongoing reporting work and ensure timely delivery
Translate business requirements into technical data definitions
Extract, manipulate and analyse data using SQL
Build and maintain dashboards and reports (BI tools)
Deliver end‑to‑end reporting solutions (analysis → query → dashboard)
Collaborate with business, operations and data teams
Present insights to stakeholders when needed




Profile

Minimum 2–3 years of experience in data analysis and reporting
Strong analytical mindset and ability to translate business needs into data solutions
Hands‑on experience with SQL (critical)
Experience with reporting tools and dashboarding
Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
Able to work independently and take ownership in a fast‑paced environment




Nice‑to‑Have

Experience with Qlik, Power BI or Tableau
Experience with Snowflake
Familiarity with tools like Jira / Confluence

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
At darwind, we are looking for a Data Consultant who enjoys bringing clarity to complexity and turning raw information into meaningful insights. You help organisations build strong data foundations, enabling better decision‑making and long‑term value creation. You will work in an environment that values autonomy, responsibility and professional growth.




What you will do

In this role, you support end‑to‑end data initiatives across business and technical teams. You will:

Collect, clean and transform data from various sources.
Build dashboards and visualisations using Power BI, Tableau or Excel.
Write and optimise SQL queries for reporting and analysis.
Support or develop data pipelines (ETL/ELT) and contribute to cloud‑based data environments.
Model datasets and design efficient, scalable data structures.
Identify patterns, trends and insights that support business decisions.
Collaborate with analysts, IT teams and business stakeholders.
Improve data quality, documentation and data governance practices.
Present findings clearly to both technical and non‑technical audiences.




Who you are

You bring structure, analytical thinking and clear communication. You also have:

A Master’s degree.
At least three years of experience in data management or a similar field.
Strong knowledge of SQL and at least one analytics or visualisation tool (Power BI, Tableau or Excel).
Understanding of data modelling, data structures and relational databases.
The ability to translate complex data into clear business insights.
A proactive, accurate and curious mindset.
Experience in cloud environments is considered an advantage.
Fluency in Dutch, with proficiency in French as a plus.




What we offer

We provide an environment where impact, ownership and development are central.

Competitive benefits package

Hospitalization insurance
Group insurance
Meal allowance
Your choice between a company car with EU fuel card or the federal mobility budget




Flexibility and work‑life balance

Hybrid work possibilities
Flexible working hours
Projects aligned with your skills and ambitions




Learning and growth

Continuous coaching
Technical and soft‑skills training
Opportunities to grow across different domains and technologies




Culture

A human, transparent and collaborative environment
Real ownership and influence on the projects you contribute to
A team that values initiative, authenticity and open communication




Ready for your next step?

If you want to work on projects where people, impact and growth truly matter, we would be happy to meet you.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Administratief medewerker data (tijdelijk – 4 maanden)




Puurs | Data-entry & administratie | Nederlands en Engels | Logistieke sector | Fulltime | Tijdelijk | 1112449




Aanbod

Onze klant biedt jou:

Een aantrekkelijk brutoloon van €2800–€3100
Maaltijdcheques van €7 per gewerkte dag
Een voltijdse tewerkstelling op de site in Puurs (eigen vervoer vereist)
Opstart midden mei
Kans op vaste indienstname bij relevante ervaring

Jouw nieuwe werkgever

Ben jij nauwkeurig, analytisch en sterk in data input? Voor een internationale logistieke organisatie in Puurs zoeken we een administratief medewerker data die een sleutelrol speelt in een grootschalige datamigratie tussen twee systemen. Je werkt in een dynamische, groeiende omgeving met een informele cultuur en veel ruimte voor initiatief.




Jouw nieuwe functie

Als administratief medewerker data ben je verantwoordelijk voor:

Correct overzetten van zendingen tussen twee systemen (datamigratie/system migration)
Uitvoeren van aanpassingen en data‑updates volgens duidelijke werkinstructies
Controleren, opsporen en rapporteren van fouten in de data
Nauw samenwerken met collega’s om een efficiënte en foutloze data processing te garanderen




Kortom: je bent een belangrijke schakel in een grootschalige systeemovergang en zorgt ervoor dat alle data correct en tijdig verwerkt wordt.




Jouw profiel

Voor deze rol als administratief medewerker data zoeken we iemand die zich herkent in het volgende:

Je werkt nauwkeurig, analytisch en gestructureerd
Je staat open voor dataverwerking en werkt graag zelfstandig
Je hebt een goede kennis van het Engels; Nederlands is een plus
Je hebt sterke systeemkennis of ervaring met data‑analyse
Je bent beschikbaar voor een tijdelijke opdracht van 4 maanden
Ervaring in de logistieke sector en/of eerdere data‑entry ervaring is een troef en kan leiden tot een vast contract




Solliciteer meteen op deze vacature

Ben jij de nauwkeurige administratieve medewerker die we zoeken voor deze tijdelijke opdracht? Solliciteer online of neem contact op met onze consultant Arzia Zekir.
