Title: Data Analyst (SQL Mandatory)
Description:
Mission




As a Data Analyst, you transform complex datasets into growth levers for our marketing strategy. You bridge the gap between raw data and commercial reality to optimize customer knowledge and our loyalty programs. Your role is essential in supporting strategic decisions through precise, data-driven analyses.




Key Responsibilities




Data Analysis: Identify customer segments and analyze purchasing habits to detect new commercial opportunities.
Loyalty Tracking: Decipher the behavior of "Bonus Card" holders to measure the impact of our marketing actions.
Business Insights: Translate complex figures and intricate charts into clear language for all audiences, converting them into concrete, actionable business behaviors.
Predictive Modeling: Calculate Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) to anticipate future consumer needs.
Data Storytelling: Create visual dashboards (Looker/Tableau) to make data accessible and intuitive for stakeholders.
Oral Presentation: Communicate your findings in a simplified and pedagogical manner during meetings with both peers and senior management.
Technical Management: Manipulate and structure databases via SQL and BigQuery while ensuring data reliability. Master the Google Cloud environment.
Customer Journey Optimization: Analyze interactions across Web, App, and In-store touchpoints to improve the overall customer experience.




Your Profile




Education: Master’s or Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative field (Business Engineering, Statistics, Computer Science.
Technical Skills: * Mandatory mastery of SQL
Experience with BigQuery or visualization tools (Looker, Tableau) is a strong asset.
Proficiency in the Google Workspace/Cloud environment.
Communication: Exceptional ability to demystify technical analyses for non-expert audiences and translate them into actionable strategies.
Mindset: An analytical spirit combined with a sharp business sense for the retail sector.
Soft Skills: Assertive communicator capable of presenting conclusions with conviction; high attention to details.
Languages: Trilingual in French, Dutch, and English




Our Offer

A full-time permanent contract (CDI)

Competitive Salary & Premium Benefits :

Company car or Mobility Budget.

Smartphone with subscription.

Meal vouchers and giftcards.

Significant discounts on Carrefour groceries.

Role-specific bonuses.

Cafeteria plan and bike leasing (after 1year).

Group and Hospitalization insurance.

Smart Way of Working: Flexible hours and arrangements to support a healthy work-life balance.

Career Growth: Tailor-made training and genuine advancement opportunities within a leading European retailer.

Diversity & Inclusion: At Carrefour, we value all generations and backgrounds. We believe diversity fuels innovation and customer satisfaction.

Title: Data Analyst Senior (H/F)
Description:
Description Du Poste

Vous serez intégré(e) dans une équipe de consultants innovants et motivés, composée de Business Analysts, Data Scientists et Data Engineers spécialisés sur les problématiques Data Analytics. À ce titre, vous interviendrez de façon opérationnelle sur des missions de conseil autour des sujets de transformation Data Analytics, de retraitement et modélisation de données et de représentation visuelle de la donnée pour adresser des problématiques métiers.

Vous serez notamment en charge de :


Comprendre les problématiques métier,
Collecter et traiter les données en vue de l'analyse, incluant notamment la création de variables agrégées et complémentaires aux données brutes,
Automatiser et d’industrialiser les retraitements effectués sur les données,
Représenter les résultats dans un outil de restitution visuelle de façon ergonomique et intuitive,
Restituer les analyses au client notamment pas la création d’indicateurs pertinents pour les questions stratégiques des entreprises


PROFIL RECHERCHE

Diplômé d'une école d'ingénieurs ou équivalent (Bac +5), vous justifiez d’a minima 5 ans d’expérience réussis en tant que data analyst :


Vous possédez une bonne connaissance des outils et méthodologies de Data Analytics, incluant notamment des bases techniques (modèles de données, langage SQL, …) mais également méthodologiques,
Vous possédez une connaissance approfondie d'Excel et maitrisez les langages statistiques tels que R, Python ou SAS,
Une connaissance d'un logiciel ou langage dédié à la Data Visualization (Tableau, Qliksense ou Qlickview, Microsoft Power BI…) ainsi que des compétences en automatisation (VBA par exemple) seraient un plus.


PROCESSUS DE RECRUTEMENT


Échangez avec un ou une chargée de recrutement pour un premier contact téléphonique
Rencontrez un ou une Ingénieure d’Affaires (Business Manager) sur vos souhaits d’évolution
Approfondissez avec nos responsables et directeurs d’agence pour connaître la vision de l'agence


Selon votre profil, des tests ou entretiens techniques pourront vous être demandés. Tout au long du processus, vous pourrez échanger avec nos consultants pour en savoir + sur leur quotidien chez nous !

PACKAGE SALARIAL

Chez Extia Belgique IT, la transparence fait partie intégrante de l'expérience positive, voici un aperçu des éléments de package salarial dont peuvent profiter nos collaborateurs, sous réserve d'éligibilité

👛 Voiture de société ou budget mobilité ✨ Chèques repas & Ecocheque 🎁 Assurance groupe 🎉 Frais de représentation 📈 Plan cafétéria / Flex Income Plan 🚀 Primes d'apport d'affaire, de cooptation et de formation 🌍 20 jours de congés légaux + 12 jours de récupération

Ces informations sont communiquées à titre indicatif et seront abordées plus en détails lors du processus de recrutement.

LES PETITS PLUS

🎉 250 événements par an pour rencontrer tes collègues et des locaux feel good 📢 Des formations, conférences et une plateforme d'e-learning avec LinkedIn pour monter en compétences #greatplacetolearn 👩‍ Des Communautés Métiers et du Mentorat pour partager son expertise et en apprendre sur de nombreux sujets #greatplacetoshare 🕹️ Une communauté de e-sport : Extia Gaming ! #greatplacetoplay 🌏 Envie d’évoluer ? Grâce à notre politique de mobilité interne, explorez de nouvelles opportunités en Belgique ou dans l’un de nos 7 autres pays !

  • Restituer les analyses au client notamment pas la création d’indicateurs pertinents pour les questions stratégiques des entreprises

PROFIL RECHERCHE

Diplômé d'une école d'ingénieurs ou équivalent (Bac +5), vous justifiez d’a minima 5 ans d’expérience réussis en tant que data analyst :

  • Vous possédez une bonne connaissance des outils et méthodologies de Data Analytics, incluant notamment des bases techniques (modèles de données, langage SQL, …) mais également méthodologiques,
  • Vous possédez une connaissance approfondie d'Excel et maitrisez les langages statistiques tels que R, Python ou SAS,
  • Une connaissance d'un logiciel ou langage dédié à la Data Visualization (Tableau, Qliksense ou Qlickview, Microsoft Power BI…) ainsi que des compétences en automatisation (VBA par exemple) seraient un plus.

PROCESSUS DE RECRUTEMENT

  • Échangez avec un ou une chargée de recrutement pour un premier contact téléphonique
  • Rencontrez un ou une Ingénieure d’Affaires (Business Manager) sur vos souhaits d’évolution
  • Approfondissez avec nos responsables et directeurs d’agence pour connaître la vision de l'agence

Selon votre profil, des tests ou entretiens techniques pourront vous être demandés. Tout au long du processus, vous pourrez échanger avec nos consultants pour en savoir + sur leur quotidien chez nous !

PACKAGE SALARIAL

Chez Extia Belgique IT, la transparence fait partie intégrante de l'expérience positive, voici un aperçu des éléments de package salarial dont peuvent profiter nos collaborateurs, sous réserve d'éligibilité

👛 Voiture de société ou budget mobilité ✨ Chèques repas & Ecocheque 🎁 Assurance groupe 🎉 Frais de représentation 📈 Plan cafétéria / Flex Income Plan 🚀 Primes d'apport d'affaire, de cooptation et de formation 🌍 20 jours de congés légaux + 12 jours de récupération

Ces informations sont communiquées à titre indicatif et seront abordées plus en détails lors du processus de recrutement.

LES PETITS PLUS

🎉 250 événements par an pour rencontrer tes collègues et des locaux feel good 📢 Des formations, conférences et une plateforme d'e-learning avec LinkedIn pour monter en compétences #greatplacetolearn 👩‍ Des Communautés Métiers et du Mentorat pour partager son expertise et en apprendre sur de nombreux sujets #greatplacetoshare 🕹️ Une communauté de e-sport : Extia Gaming ! #greatplacetoplay 🌏 Envie d’évoluer ? Grâce à notre politique de mobilité interne, explorez de nouvelles opportunités en Belgique ou dans l’un de nos 7 autres pays !

Title: Data Analyst (m/f/d)
Description:
Company Description

About EIT RawMaterials

As the world moves towards a greener future, the demand for raw materials—minerals and metals—is set to increase immensely over the next three decades. Europe faces a critical challenge in securing a stable supply of these essential resources. This challenge is where EIT RawMaterials steps in.

EIT RawMaterials is at the forefront of driving innovation and sustainability in the raw materials sector. As an Innovation Community within the European Institute of Innovation and Technology (EIT), we collaborate with over 300 partners across industry, academia, and research institutes. Together, we forge dynamic, long-term partnerships to develop innovative solutions that meet Europe's growing demand for raw materials

Position

Role Overview

The Data Analyst (m/f/d) in the Innovation and Product Development Team supports data‑driven decision‑making by transforming complex commodities and market data into clear, actionable insights. The role focuses on building high‑quality dashboards, analysing trends in minerals and metals markets, and working closely with internal stakeholders to deliver reliable reporting, meaningful insights, and self‑service analytics solutions that support innovation, strategy, and product development activities.

Tasks And Responsibilities


Data Visualisation & Reporting
Design, build and maintain interactive dashboards and reports (e.g. in Power BI, Tableau, Qlik, or similar tools) for internal stakeholders.
Translate complex commodities market data (esp. minerals and metals) into clear, user-friendly visual narratives.
Develop standardised reporting templates and data visualisation guidelines to ensure a consistent look-and-feel and interpretation.
Implement self-service BI solutions, enabling non-technical users to explore and filter data independently.
Continuously improve and iterate on dashboards based on user feedback and changing business needs.
Data Analysis & Insights Generation
Perform exploratory data analysis on commodity price data, market indices, supply-demand indicators, and other relevant datasets.
Identify patterns, trends, correlations, and anomalies in raw, advanced and critical materials markets.
Prepare ad-hoc analyses and visualisations to support strategic projects, management decisions, and external reporting.
Develop KPIs and metrics to monitor market developments and internal performance indicators.
Summarise findings in clear, concise insight reports, including visual storytelling and key messages tailored to the audience.
Data Management & Engineering Collaboration
Work closely with other teams or experts to ensure reliable data pipelines, from data ingestion to visualisation.
Contribute to the design of data models, semantic layers, and datasets optimised for BI and visualisation tools.
Help define and maintain data quality checks (e.g. completeness, consistency, timeliness) for commodities and market data.
Support integration of external data sources (market feeds, APIs, databases, files) into the analytics environment.
Document data sources, definitions, transformations and business logic used in dashboards and reports.
Stakeholder Engagement & Consulting
Act as a trusted partner for internal stakeholders (e.g. business development, strategy, innovation, procurement, finance).
Work with stakeholders to refine requirements, prioritise dashboard features, and understand decision-making needs.
Provide training and guidance to colleagues on how to interpret and use dashboards and visualisations.
Present key findings and dashboards to non-technical audiences, explaining methodology, assumptions, and limitations.
Critically review data to spot errors, inconsistencies, and anomalies in large datasets.
Collect and structure user feedback to drive continuous improvement of analytics products.
Governance, Standards & Innovation
Contribute to best practices and standards for data visualisation, data storytelling, and reporting within the organisation.
Ensure compliance with data governance, security and privacy policies.
Stay up to date on tools, methods and trends in data visualisation, BI and commodities analytics.
Prototype and test new visualisation approaches (e.g. advanced charts, geospatial visualisations, scenario simulations).


Requirements & Skills


Education & Background
Degree in Computer Science, Data/Information Systems, Data Science, Statistics, Economics, Engineering, or similar quantitative field.
Equivalent experience in data analytics and visualisation is also considered.
Professional Experience
3+ years in a Data Analyst, BI Analyst, or Visualisation-focused role.
Any consulting background would be appreciated
Experience with commodities/commodity market data, ideally in minerals or metals.
Strong background in analysing prices, indices, supply–demand, trading or risk-related datasets.
Exposure to raw, advanced or critical materials is a plus.
Proven ability to deliver business-relevant dashboards and insights.
Exposure to Market Intelligence topics is a plus
Technical Skills – Must Have
Data Visualisation: Advanced skills in Power BI, Tableau, Qlik, or Looker, including modelling and complex calculations.
Analysis & Querying: Strong SQL + experience with Python (pandas, plotly, matplotlib) or R.
Data Infrastructure: Understanding of databases, ETL/ELT, APIs, and preferably cloud environments (Azure, AWS, GCP).
Data Modelling & Quality: Ability to build reporting models and ensure data quality and validation.
Excel: Advanced user (Power Query, pivot tables, formulas).
Technical Skills – Nice to Have
Time‑series forecasting for commodity prices.
Experience with financial/market data feeds & APIs.
Geospatial visualisation skills (GIS, maps).
Familiarity with Git or collaborative development.
Understanding of risk analytics or scenario modelling.


Other Information

Additional Information & Our Recruitment Process


Commitment to Diversity: EIT RawMaterials is committed to diversity and inclusion. We encourage applications from all qualified individuals, regardless of background.
Employment Type: Temporary Position on a two-year contract with the possibility of extension.
Position Location: Germany, Belgium, Poland, Italy, Slovenia, Latvia, Finland, Greece, Hungary and Austria


The position will stay open until a successful candidate is chosen.


Application Review: Our team thoroughly reviews each application. Please make sure to submit your CV in English.
Initial Interview (30 minutes): Meet with the hiring manager and recruitment team.
Second Interview (60 minutes): Second interview with a presentation on a relevant topic to the hiring manager and the HR team.
Offer: If successful, receive an offer to join our team.

Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:
Salt is currently hiring a Senior Data Analyst with experience in R and Survey programming.




Looking for a B2B contractor, who can start immediately and the contract is for 3 months.




Please see Description below:




Data Modelling & Analytics

Build and maintain predictive models in R (or similar tools) to support quantitative research and consumer insights.
Translate research objectives into structured analytical frameworks and statistical workflows.
Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and reproducibility across studies.

Research Operations & Technical Delivery

Manage data pipelines, survey integrations, and third-party research platforms.
Act as the technical lead for panel providers including PureSpectrum, Cint, and Dynata.
Troubleshoot issues across data collection, processing, and reporting workflows.
Support the development of scalable research infrastructure and automation processes.

Insights & Stakeholder Communication

Turn complex datasets into clear narratives, visualisations, and actionable recommendations.
Create concise, visually engaging presentations that communicate research findings effectively.
Partner with Strategy and Client teams to deliver insight-led recommendations with commercial impact.
Present analytical findings confidently to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Automation & AI Innovation

Implement AI and automation tools to improve analysis and reporting efficiency.
Prototype and test AI-driven approaches to modelling, insight generation, and reporting.
Balance innovation with methodological rigor and data quality standards.

Skills & Experience

5+ years’ experience in quantitative research, analytics, or data science within a research, insights, or consultancy environment.
Strong proficiency in R or equivalent statistical and analytical tools.
Experience with survey programming, logic design, and data validation.
Understanding of APIs, data integrations, and third-party research platforms.
Experience implementing automation or AI-enabled workflows.
Ability to communicate complex analytical concepts clearly and effectively.
Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities and stakeholders simultaneously.

Title: Functional Analyst Energy
Description:
⚡ Functional Analyst – Energy Sector

📍 Brussels | Permanent Contract

eXalt is recruiting a Functional Analyst on a permanent basis to work on high‑impact assignments for key players in the energy sector (TSOs, DSOs, suppliers, traders, producers).

This is a great opportunity to put your analytical skills to work on strategic projects that are shaping the energy systems of tomorrow.

🔍 Your Role

You will act as a bridge between business stakeholders and technical teams.

Your responsibilities will include:

Understanding the operational challenges of energy market players and clarifying business needs.
Modelling processes, data flows and use cases (UML, BPMN).
Analysing and formalising requests, incidents, problems and changes within an ITIL framework.
Writing clear and actionable functional specifications for IT teams.
Contributing to solution design, testing, integration and follow‑up of evolutions.
Maintaining documentation and supporting knowledge sharing.
Facilitating communication between business users, architects, developers and operations teams.

⚙️ Your Assets in the Energy Sector

Experience or exposure to one or more of the following areas is considered a strong advantage:

MIG & market processes: MIG6, MIG DGO, billing, settlement.
Incident, problem and change management (ITIL).
Process optimisation and development (BPM).
Service management and collaboration tools (Topdesk), SQL, Jira, Confluence.
CMS contexts and exchanges between DSOs, suppliers and market stakeholders.

You don’t need to be an expert in everything — we are looking for a structured, autonomous professional who is comfortable working in complex, multi‑stakeholder environments.

🎯 Profile

4 to 10 years of experience as a Functional Analyst or Business Analyst.
Experience in data analysis, BPM and stakeholder management.
Solid understanding of IT architectures: APIs, databases, batch processing.
Proficiency with tools such as UML, SQL, Jira and Confluence (Topdesk is a plus).
ITIL and Scrum certifications are an asset.
Native French or Dutch, with ideally a good command of the other national language.
Professional working proficiency in English.
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree.

🌟 About eXalt

eXalt is a community of more than 1,500 consultants, multilingual digital experts dedicated to transformation and specialised in Product & Project Management.

Founded in July 2018 around the values of intrapreneurship, co‑learning and co‑construction, eXalt is committed to long‑term partnerships with both its clients and its teams — remaining, for years to come, an agile and reinvented consulting start‑up.

Experiencing rapid and ambitious growth, eXalt has also expanded its model into several specialised entities:

eXalt Fi for capital markets, eXalt Tech for IT (development, cloud and infrastructure), eXalt Shield for cybersecurity, and eXalt Value for data.

Title: HR Data Analyst
Description:
Wat ga je doen

As HR Data Analyst, you increase insight into how our associates experience HR and our key HR KPI’s. You will help lead our HR community to drive data-driven decision making across our organization. You will design and create (where needed together with our BI or IT teams) operational/tactical metrics and dashboards that will assist in making decisions on different HR domains. You will be partnering across teams to ensure that our HR metrics are consistent and aligned to our strategic goals. You will be responsible for digging into the details to improve data quality, show new insights and make new recommendations that will impact decision making.


Profound expertise on HR data, HR reporting’s (operational & strategic) and HR dashboard(s) : With your profound expertise on HR data, reporting and dashboards you easily identify possible impacts and are able to create ad-hoc reports.
Drive data-driven decision making : You help lead our HR community to drive data-driven decision making across our organization. You provide HR related insights to our HR Community and organization.
HR Data analytics roadmap : Take ownership of our HR Data analytics roadmap by identifying, designing and deploying HR metrics and dashboards.
Stakeholder management : Identify and support stakeholders to become data-minded. Take initiatives to increase data awareness.
Predictive analytics : Co-deliver, together with the BI team, predictive analytics for HR.


Wie ben jij


You have a master degree in Econometrics, Mathemathics, Statistics, Computer Sciences or other relevant fields of study around Data, Math/Statistics.
You have a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience.
You have experience with Power BI, and ideally other data analytics tools.
Ideally, you have experience with SAP HR and SuccessFactors.
You have proven to be convincing and to be able to build trust and alignment on all levels in and outside the organization.
You should be passionate about and have experience with data and reportings and have a passion to learn and master new data analysis techniques and data science methodologies. You follow pro-actively trends in the business.
You are skilled at providing clear insights within a demanding environment.
You bring strong interpersonal communication skills.
You have the ability to work cross-functionally.
You have proven to be creative in finding solutions for complex issues with detail-oriented and simplicity mindset.
You have a strong analytical profile and ability to document requirements, functional specifications, decisions made, etc.
You have project management skills.
You manage change and drive process improvement.
You are fluent in Dutch or French, with a good knowledge of English.


Wat we bieden

Een job én een rijkelijk gevuld privéleven? Bij Delhaize kan dat. Je krijgt een aantrekkelijk loon aangepast aan jouw ervaring. Bovendien geniet je van diverse extralegale voordelen: bedrijfswagen met tank- of laadkaart binnen het federaal mobiliteitsbudget, gsm plus abonnement, netto vergoeding, jaarlijkse bonus, maaltijdcheques, uitgebreide groepsverzekering en facultatieve hospitalisatieverzekering, en uiteraard een personeelskorting in de winkel! Thuiswerk spreekt voor zich en wordt voor elke job anders ingevuld. En groeien? Dat gaat hard bij Delhaize. Door de opleidingen, op de werkvloer én via onze opleidingscatalogus, krijg je daar de ruimte voor. Doorgroeien? Ook dat kan. Vraag maar aan één van je toekomstige collega’s. Spreekt bovenstaande functie jou aan? Solliciteer dan onmiddellijk en ontdek wat jouw mogelijkheden zijn bij Delhaize!

Over Delhaize

Beter leven begint bij beter eten. Dat geloven wij bij Delhaize met heel ons hart. Daarom zetten wij ons in voor het eten op het bord van 5 miljoen klanten, elke week opnieuw. In meer dan 810 winkels kunnen Belgische en Luxemburgse klanten terecht voor een uitgebreid assortiment van meer dan 20.000 kwaliteitsproducten. Van een snelle stop in een Shop&Go, over dagelijkse boodschappen in een lokale Proxy tot een ruim aanbod binnen onze AD Delhaize's; en vergeet zeker onze e-commerce diensten niet.

Die hele keten van voeding, die start binnen onze Logistiek. De 2200 collega's in onze distributiecentra van Zellik en Ninove verwerken dagelijks alle producten van onze leveranciers, vaak van Belgische bodem, en brengen deze via meer dan 3000 leveringen per dag tot bij onze winkels.

Maar het stopt niet in onze winkels of logistiek. Want ook onze meer dan 1000 collega's binnen Finance, HR, IT, Commerce of Legal staan staan om elkaar en onze klanten te helpen goed te eten.

Thuiswerk spreekt voor zich en wordt voor elke job anders ingevuld. En groeien? Dat gaat hard bij Delhaize. Door de opleidingen, op de werkvloer én via onze opleidingscatalogus, krijg je daar de ruimte voor. Doorgroeien? Ook dat kan. Vraag maar aan één van je toekomstige collega’s. Spreekt bovenstaande functie jou aan? Solliciteer dan onmiddellijk en ontdek wat jouw mogelijkheden zijn bij Delhaize!

Over Delhaize

Beter leven begint bij beter eten. Dat geloven wij bij Delhaize met heel ons hart. Daarom zetten wij ons in voor het eten op het bord van 5 miljoen klanten, elke week opnieuw. In meer dan 810 winkels kunnen Belgische en Luxemburgse klanten terecht voor een uitgebreid assortiment van meer dan 20.000 kwaliteitsproducten. Van een snelle stop in een Shop&Go, over dagelijkse boodschappen in een lokale Proxy tot een ruim aanbod binnen onze AD Delhaize's; en vergeet zeker onze e-commerce diensten niet.

Die hele keten van voeding, die start binnen onze Logistiek. De 2200 collega's in onze distributiecentra van Zellik en Ninove verwerken dagelijks alle producten van onze leveranciers, vaak van Belgische bodem, en brengen deze via meer dan 3000 leveringen per dag tot bij onze winkels.

Maar het stopt niet in onze winkels of logistiek. Want ook onze meer dan 1000 collega's binnen Finance, HR, IT, Commerce of Legal staan staan om elkaar en onze klanten te helpen goed te eten.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Job Description

Je maakt deel uit van het Technology & Partnership Reporting team. Dit team speelt een sleutelrol in het ondersteunen van de dagelijkse besluitvorming van senior management door tijdige, accurate en inzichtelijke rapportering te leveren over technologie-initiatieven en de prestaties van partners. We werken nauw samen met interne technology teams en externe partners om reportingprioriteiten op elkaar af te stemmen, prestaties op te volgen en inzichten bloot te leggen die aanzetten tot actie. Zo helpen we mee vormgeven aan hoe Telenet haar technologie- en partnershipstrategie realiseert.

Jouw taken als Data Analyst


Je ontwikkelt een sterke nieuwsgierigheid en een diepgaand begrip van de businesscontext en processen binnen jouw domein.
Je begrijpt de businesscontext en onderliggende processen van business requests en vertaalt die naar duidelijke insights-vragen.
Je verzamelt, bevraagt, cleant, valideert en transformeert data uit verschillende bronnen ter ondersteuning van reporting- en analytische noden.
Je definieert, bouwt en automatiseert reporting dashboards rond de technology- en partnershipthema’s waaraan je werkt.
Je bouwt een proactieve samenwerking uit met je stakeholders, anticipeert op hun noden en brengt data-driven aanbevelingen aan.
Je voert diepgaande analyses uit op specifieke insights vragen die leiden tot concrete en actiegerichte aanbevelingen voor de business en je collega’s.
Je draagt bij aan het optimaliseren van reportingprocessen, tools en methodologieën, inclusief het behandelen van adhoc business requests.
Je neemt een actieve rol op binnen de community van data professionals bij Telenet via kennisdeling, inspiratiesessies en coaching.


Jouw profiel als ideale Data Analyst


Je beschikt over sterke analytische vaardigheden.
Je hebt een hands-on mentaliteit en duikt graag zelf diep in de data om antwoorden te vinden.
Je hebt een constructieve mindset en werkt vlot samen met collega’s uit verschillende teams, zowel met business- als
analytische profielen.
Je kan een analytics initiatief van A tot Z managen, inclusief sterke communicatie- en presentatievaardigheden en stakeholder management.
Je hebt ervaring met reporting en een degelijk inzicht in performance measurement.
Je hebt een grondige kennis van minstens één dashboardtool (Qlik Sense, Power BI of Tableau). Ervaring met Qlik Sense is een grote plus, aangezien dit onze primaire reportingtool is.
Je hebt een uitstekende kennis van SQL. Ervaring met Snowflake is een pluspunt.
Je hebt interesse in technologie, IT en operationele processen.
Je behaalde een masterdiploma in een kwantitatieve richting (business engineering, TEW, computer science, information management, …).
Je hebt minstens 3 jaar relevante werkervaring.
Je bent vlot in Engels. Kennis van Nederlands en/of Frans is een plus.


Ons aanbod voor jou

Bij Telenet group krijg je meer dan alleen een aantrekkelijk brutoloon. We geloven sterk in resultaten en ownership: we geven vertrouwen, maar verwachten ook engagement en impact. Wat jij realiseert, telt echt.

Naast een dertiende maand en vakantiegeld kan je rekenen op een uitgebreid pakket aan extralegale voordelen dat je ondersteunt in je dagelijkse leven én je werk.

Wat mag je concreet verwachten?


Mobiliteitsbudget: stel zelf je mobiliteitsplan samen, met keuze voor een bedrijfswagen of alternatieve vervoersoplossingen
Maaltijdcheques en ecocheques
Smartphone, mobiel abonnement, laptop en personeelskorting
Collectieve bonus en individuele bonus (afgestemd op jouw prestaties)
Hospitalisatieverzekering (inclusief ambulant plan) en groepsverzekering
20 wettelijke verlofdagen en 12 ADV-dagen


We vinden het belangrijk dat je je kan blijven ontwikkelen. Daarom investeren we in jouw groei via ons intern leerplatform, coaching en leren op de werkvloer. Je krijgt kansen om bij te leren en jezelf verder te versterken in je rol.

Samenwerken doen we het liefst van dichtbij. We geloven dat sterke teams ontstaan door elkaar regelmatig te zien en snel te kunnen schakelen. Daarom verwachten we dat je als nieuwe collega minimum drie dagen per week op kantoor werkt gedurende de eerste zes maanden. De overige dagen kan je van thuis werken.

Wat gebeurt er na je sollicitatie?

Zie jij jezelf in deze rol? Dan kijken we uit naar je sollicitatie. We laten altijd iets van ons horen. Wanneer je wordt meegenomen in de eerste selectie, nemen we contact met je op om kennis te maken en lichten we de volgende stappen van ons selectieproces toe.

Title: Functional Analyst
Description:
Functional Analyst




About the Role: We are looking for a talented Functional Analyst to join the B2B Belgium Business Platform. This platform is dedicated to serving B2B customers in Belgium. The platform consists of about 180 team members, with 120 focused on business operations and 60 on IS and Data.




Role Overview: In this role, you will join our “Data Team” to work on various use cases related to our Data Platform, including Financial Closing reports, Customer Business Reporting, Green Energy Reporting, and regulatory reporting.




Key Responsibilities:

Serve as a bridge between product owners, internal customers, and the technical Data Team, ensuring clear understanding of business requirements.
Collaborate with stakeholders to analyze business needs and translate them into clear data models.
Engage with application and source data owners to map out functional data flows, leveraging your technical expertise to ask critical questions.
Plan, organize, and execute functional testing, creating concrete test plans and participating in test execution.
Tackle complex analytical challenges and provide data-driven insights to support business decisions.
Use tools like SQL, Dataiku, and Python to gather and manipulate data.
Create reports and visualizations using Power BI to communicate findings effectively.
Prepare data products for transition to the service mode, ensuring smooth handover.
Contribute to maintaining up-to-date documentation for data products and processes.
Provide ad-hoc analysis and support business and financial queries with data-backed answers.




Required Skills and Experience:




Must-Have:

Proven experience in the energy sector, with exposure to SAP ISU (Invoicing).
Strong background in the financial sector, particularly with financial closing processes.
Proven experience in Functional Analysis and Data Warehouse (DWH) modeling.
Strong analytical skills with a proactive, hands-on approach.
Ability to work independently and manage tasks autonomously.
Excellent communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to engage stakeholders effectively.
Proficiency in SQL, Python, and Power BI.
Experience working in Agile methodologies.

Nice-to-Have:

Familiarity with technical systems such as SAP ISU and SalesForce.
Knowledge of monthly financial closing processes.
Experience with Agile tools like Azure DevOps.
Familiarity with Data platform concepts, particularly in the AWS ecosystem.
Interest in Data Science and a hands-on, curious approach to learning.




Soft Skills:




Must-Have:

Strong ability to translate business requirements into effective technical solutions with a focus on design and supportability.
Eagerness to dive into business logic, especially related to pricing.
Ability to address complex analytical challenges and provide insightful solutions.
Flexibility to work on various topics and support business needs across different areas.
Strong communication skills, especially when engaging with diverse stakeholders.
Team-oriented, with the ability to collaborate effectively across global teams.
Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines, especially during month-end closings.
Strong attention to detail and discipline in documentation practices.




Education and Experience:

Bachelor’s or Master’s degree.
5-7 years of experience as a data analyst or in a similar position.




Languages:

Fluent in either Dutch or French.
Fluent in English.




If you're passionate about data, the energy sector, and eager to drive meaningful change, we'd love to hear from you!




#Nexeo #Belgium #Brussels #Data #Functional #Analyst #SQL #Python #PowerBI #Agile #SAP #Azure DevOps #Energy #DWH

Title: Business Analyst Data & Scrum Master H/F
Description:
🧩 Darwin Partners, un véritable partenaire de carrière 🧩




Chez Darwin Partners, nous ne nous contentons pas de recruter : nous accompagnons chaque consultant dans son évolution professionnelle en lui proposant des missions qui correspondent à ses aspirations.

Avec une culture dynamique et axée sur l’impact, nous connectons les meilleurs talents IT à des projets ambitieux, tout en cultivant des relations humaines et authentiques.

👥 Nos clients ? Des entreprises innovantes dans différents secteurs d’activité (banque, assurance, finance, industrie, e-commerce, marchés publics, trading, médical ...) et des projets à forte valeur ajoutée sur différents métiers (étude & développement, fonctionnel, agilité, infrastructure, réseaux, data, cloud ...)

🤝 Notre engagement ? Un suivi régulier, une écoute active et une véritable proximité avec nos talents.

✨ Notre promesse ? Des projets enrichissants et une rémunération à la hauteur de votre talent.







23.$.Dans le cadre du renforcement d’une équipe agile au sein d’un acteur majeur du secteur financier basé à Bruxelles, nous recherchons un(e) Business/Data Analyst & Scrum Master afin d’accompagner des projets liés à l’Investment Management et aux environnements data.

Vous évoluerez dans un contexte international, orienté données et transformation digitale, avec une forte collaboration entre les équipes métiers et IT.




🔒 Vos missions 🔒

Recueillir, analyser et formaliser les besoins métiers et fonctionnels
Participer à l’analyse de données et à la compréhension des flux backend
Travailler sur des environnements SQL, API et datawarehouse
Assurer le lien entre les équipes métiers, data et techniques
Participer à la rédaction des spécifications fonctionnelles et techniques
Accompagner les équipes dans la compréhension des enjeux data
Animer les cérémonies Agile/Scrum de la squad
Suivre l’avancement des sujets et faciliter la collaboration entre les parties prenantes
Contribuer à l’amélioration continue des processus et méthodes de travail




🧠 Le profil que nous recherchons 🧠

Expérience de 3 à 8 ans en Business Analysis / Data Analysis
Très bonne expérience en analyse de données et compréhension des environnements data
Solides compétences sur SQL, API et environnements backend
Expérience en tant que Scrum Master et/ou certifications Scrum
Bonne compréhension des principes liés à la data et aux architectures datawarehouse
Une expérience dans le secteur financier est appréciée
Une connaissance des domaines Private Banking, Asset Management ou de l'assurance constitue un réel plus
Excellente communication et capacité à interagir avec des interlocuteurs variés
Anglais courant obligatoire
Français ou néerlandais courant requis




📍 Localisation : Bruxelles

📅 Démarrage : ASAP

📄 Contrat : CDI / Freelance / Portage salarial







💡 Ce qui fait notre différence au sein de Darwin Partners 💡

Une entreprise à taille humaine et smart, avec une approche personnalisée et bienveillante.
Près de 140 collaborateurs engagés au quotidien pour des projets à fort impact.
Des missions techniques et stratégiques, où vous aurez un vrai rôle à jouer.
Un accompagnement sur-mesure, avec des perspectives d’évolution concrètes.




📌 Notre processus de recrutement 📌

1️⃣ Premier échange RH – Pour parler de vous, de vos ambitions et de nos opportunités

2️⃣ Entretien technique & fonctionnel – Échange avec un manager ou un consultant senior

3️⃣ Entretien client – Rencontre avec l’entreprise partenaire pour valider le bon fit

📩 Prêt(e) à nous rejoindre ?

N’hésitez pas à postuler directement via cette annonce en cliquant sur “Candidature Simplifiée” !

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Intro




Elke marketingcampagne die werkt, begint met de juiste inzichten. Bij Rode Kruis Vlaanderen speelt data een cruciale rol in de werving en de retentie van bloed-/plasmadonoren en financiële schenkers.




Als Data Analist zorg jij ervoor dat marketingacties hun doel niet missen. Met doordachte analyses, sterke doelgroepselecties en heldere rapportering lever je een directe bijdrage aan levensreddende initiatieven.




Wil jij je analytische skills inzetten in een context waar data écht het verschil maakt? Dan is deze functie iets voor jou.




Functiebeschrijving




Als Data Analist ben je binnen het marketingteam hét aanspreekpunt voor campagnes, rapportering en diepgaandere analyses. Je werkt nauw samen met collega’s van Marketing en wordt inhoudelijk ondersteund door het Hoofd CRM, Analyse & Data.




Je vertaalt marketingdoelstellingen naar gerichte dataselecties en inzichten, en zorgt ervoor dat campagnes correct worden opgezet, opgevolgd en geëvalueerd.




Wat ga je concreet doen?

Opzetten, valideren en beheren van campagnes in de CRM-tool (Dynamics D365), in nauwe samenwerking met marketingverantwoordelijken.
Ontwikkelen en onderhouden van (standaard)rapporten die duidelijke inzichten geven in prestaties en resultaten.
Uitvoeren van ad hoc analyses en meewerken aan verbeteringen in datakwaliteit en dataprocessen.
Collega’s adviseren over doelgroepselecties en datagedreven keuzes voor specifieke marketingacties.
Meewerken aan marketing en databasegerelateerde projecten, waarbij je data structureel mee helpt versterken.




Dankzij jouw werk worden campagnes relevanter, gerichter en effectiever.




Jouw profiel




Je hebt een relevante hogere opleiding afgerond en interesse in data, analyse en marketing.
Zowel junior profielen als kandidaten met ervaring in customer journeys of marketing automation zijn welkom.
Je hebt een goede kennis van SQL en Excel.
Je hebt ervaring met klantanalyse, rapportering en werken in cross functionele teams.
Je werkt analytisch, nauwkeurig en probleemoplossend.
Je kan zelfstandig werken en neemt initiatief.
Ervaring met projectmatig werken is een plus.
Je communiceert vlot in Nederlands, Engels is een pluspunt.
Extra troeven: ervaring met rapportering- of datavisualisatietools (Power BI, IBM Cognos), marketing automation suites of Dynamics D365 Customer Insights.




Ons aanbod




Bij Rode Kruis Vlaanderen kies je voor meer dan een datafunctie alleen. Je komt terecht in een organisatie waar jouw analyses rechtstreeks bijdragen aan levens redden en mensen helpen.




Wij bieden jou:




Een boeiende en gevarieerde functie waarin je impact hebt van strategie tot uitvoering.
Veel ruimte voor initiatief en zelfstandigheid, met vertrouwen in jouw expertise.
Samenwerking in een professioneel marketingteam waar data steeds meer centraal staat.
Een contract van onbepaalde duur, met stabiliteit en toekomstperspectief.
Een marktconforme verloning, aangevuld met de voordelen die horen bij Rode Kruis Vlaanderen.
De kans om je verder te ontwikkelen in marketing analytics, CRM en data gedreven werken.
Een job met maatschappelijke meerwaarde, waarin jouw werk bijdraagt aan bloed en plasmadonatie, fondsenwerving en levensreddende initiatieven.




Kortom: een rol waarin je analytische scherpte, samenwerking en maatschappelijke impact combineert, elke dag opnieuw.

Intro


Elke marketingcampagne die werkt, begint met de juiste inzichten. Bij Rode Kruis Vlaanderen speelt data een cruciale rol in de werving en de retentie van bloed-/plasmadonoren en financiële schenkers.


Als Data Analist zorg jij ervoor dat marketingacties hun doel niet missen. Met doordachte analyses, sterke doelgroepselecties en heldere rapportering lever je een directe bijdrage aan levensreddende initiatieven.


Wil jij je analytische skills inzetten in een context waar data écht het verschil maakt? Dan is deze functie iets voor jou.


Functiebeschrijving


Als Data Analist ben je binnen het marketingteam hét aanspreekpunt voor campagnes, rapportering en diepgaandere analyses. Je werkt nauw samen met collega’s van Marketing en wordt inhoudelijk ondersteund door het Hoofd CRM, Analyse & Data.


Je vertaalt marketingdoelstellingen naar gerichte dataselecties en inzichten, en zorgt ervoor dat campagnes correct worden opgezet, opgevolgd en geëvalueerd.


Wat ga je concreet doen?

  • Opzetten, valideren en beheren van campagnes in de CRM-tool (Dynamics D365), in nauwe samenwerking met marketingverantwoordelijken.

  • Collega’s adviseren over doelgroepselecties en datagedreven keuzes voor specifieke marketingacties.
  • Meewerken aan marketing en databasegerelateerde projecten, waarbij je data structureel mee helpt versterken.


Dankzij jouw werk worden campagnes relevanter, gerichter en effectiever.

Title: Online Data Analyst
Description:
Online Data Analyst

Are you detail-oriented with a passion for research and a good grasp of national and local geography? This freelance role lets you work at your own pace from home!

Role Overview:

Put your research skills to work improving the digital maps that millions of people rely on every day.

You'll conduct web-based evaluations to verify data accuracy, compare information across sources, and ensure the mapping content powering global navigation services is precise and relevant—all while working from home on your own schedule!

Requirements:

Fluency in English and French
Residency in Belgium for the past two years
Familiarity with local business, media, sports, news, social media, and culture in Belgium
Ability to follow guidelines and conduct online research
Flexibility to handle diverse tasks including maps, news, and audio
Daily access to broadband internet, computer, and relevant software
Willingness to work on a freelance basis

Recruitment Process:

To join the program, after you complete your application you will be invited to take an open book qualification exam. We will provide guidelines and learning materials in advance, and you can complete the exam at your convenience within a specific timeframe.

As part of our hiring process, candidates who progress past the initial screening and qualification stages may be asked to complete a third-party identity and background verification. This verification is conducted through a secure external provider and may require you to provide government-issued identification and other documentation at that later stage.

Please note we do not use this information to make initial application screening decisions.

Why join the TELUS Digital AI Community?

Flexibility: Work at your own pace from home
Global impact: Be part of a 1million+ strong AI Community
Innovation: Support machine learning models for world-leading brands
Growth: No previous professional experience required
Long-term opportunity: This is a part-time, long-term, independent freelance position

Equal Opportunity:

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for a contractual relationship without regards to race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or protected veteran status. At Telus Digital AI, we are proud to offer equal opportunities and are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive community. All aspects of selection are based on applicants’ qualifications, merits, competence, and performance without regards to any characteristic related to diversity.

Apply today to join our dynamic and innovative team!

Title: HR Data Analyst
Description:
Ce que vous allez faire

As HR Data Analyst, you increase insight into how our associates experience HR and our key HR KPI’s. You will help lead our HR community to drive data-driven decision making across our organization. You will design and create (where needed together with our BI or IT teams) operational/tactical metrics and dashboards that will assist in making decisions on different HR domains. You will be partnering across teams to ensure that our HR metrics are consistent and aligned to our strategic goals. You will be responsible for digging into the details to improve data quality, show new insights and make new recommendations that will impact decision making.


Profound expertise on HR data, HR reporting’s (operational & strategic) and HR dashboard(s) : With your profound expertise on HR data, reporting and dashboards you easily identify possible impacts and are able to create ad-hoc reports.
Drive data-driven decision making : You help lead our HR community to drive data-driven decision making across our organization. You provide HR related insights to our HR Community and organization.
HR Data analytics roadmap : Take ownership of our HR Data analytics roadmap by identifying, designing and deploying HR metrics and dashboards.
Stakeholder management : Identify and support stakeholders to become data-minded. Take initiatives to increase data awareness.
Predictive analytics : Co-deliver, together with the BI team, predictive analytics for HR.


Qui êtes-vous ?


You have a master degree in Econometrics, Mathemathics, Statistics, Computer Sciences or other relevant fields of study around Data, Math/Statistics.
You have a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience.
You have experience with Power BI, and ideally other data analytics tools.
Ideally, you have experience with SAP HR and SuccessFactors.
You have proven to be convincing and to be able to build trust and alignment on all levels in and outside the organization.
You should be passionate about and have experience with data and reportings and have a passion to learn and master new data analysis techniques and data science methodologies. You follow pro-actively trends in the business.
You are skilled at providing clear insights within a demanding environment.
You bring strong interpersonal communication skills.
You have the ability to work cross-functionally.
You have proven to be creative in finding solutions for complex issues with detail-oriented and simplicity mindset.
You have a strong analytical profile and ability to document requirements, functional specifications, decisions made, etc.
You have project management skills.
You manage change and drive process improvement.
You are fluent in Dutch or French, with a good knowledge of English.


Ce que nous offrons


Un emploi et une vie privée richement remplie? Chez Delhaize, c'est possible.
Vous recevrez un salaire attractif et adapté à votre expérience. De plus, vous bénéficiez de divers avantages extralégaux:
voiture de société avec carte carburant/recharge, dans le cadre du budget mobilité fédéral,
téléphone portable plus abonnement,
rémunération nette,
bonus annuel,
chèques-repas,
une assurance groupe étendue et une assurance hospitalisation facultative
une réduction pour le personnel dans le magasin!
De plus, chez nous le télétravail coule de source, son application dépend d’une fonction à une autre.
Et qu'en est-il de l'apprentissage constant? Ça va vite chez Delhaize. Grâce aux formations, sur le terrain et via notre catalogue de formations, vous obtenez l'espace nécessaire pour le faire.
Continuer à évoluer? C'est également possible. Demandez à l'un de vos futurs collègues.

La fonction ci-dessus vous intéresse? Alors postulez immédiatement et découvrez quelles sont vos opportunités chez Delhaize!

A propos de Delhaize

Mieux manger pour mieux vivre. C’est le cœur de notre engagement chez Delhaize. C'est pourquoi nous nous engageons à remplir les assiettes de 5 millions de clients chaque semaine. Plus de 810 magasins offrent aux clients belges et luxembourgeois un large assortiment de plus de 20 000 produits de qualité. Que ce soit lors d’un rapide passage dans un Shop&Go, pour des courses quotidiennes dans un Proxy local ou une offre étendue dans nos AD Delhaize, sans oublier nos services d’e-commerce.

Toute cette chaîne alimentaire commence par notre logistique. Les 2 200 collègues de nos centres de distribution de Zellik et de Ninove traitent chaque jour tous les produits provenant de nos fournisseurs, souvent situés en Belgique, et les livrent dans nos magasins via plus de 3 000 livraisons par jour.

Mais cela ne s'arrête pas à nos magasins ou à notre logistique. Car nos quelque 1 000 collègues des services Finance, RH, IT, Commerce ou Legal sont également là pour collaborer avec nous et aider nos clients à bien manger.

Title: Business Intelligence Analyst
Description:
Business Analyst Data & Automation - English required - ALTEN Belgium




The Position

As part of our ongoing growth, we are looking for a Business Analyst Data & Automation to join our teams and work on client projects located in Belgium.




As a Business Analyst Data & Automation, your main responsibilities will include:




Gather and analyze business requirements from stakeholders and translate them into functional and technical specifications.
Design, develop, and maintain Power BI dashboards, Power Apps, and Power Automate solutions to support business operations.
Work with SAP ECC data and data lake structures to ensure data quality, consistency, and efficient reporting.
Optimize existing tools (Excel/VBA) and drive the transition towards automated and scalable solutions.
Contribute to continuous improvement by identifying automation opportunities and accelerating delivery using Agile methodologies and modern tools.




Your Profile




Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in IT, Engineering, Business, or equivalent.
Proven experience in business analysis and stakeholder management in a data-driven environment.
Hands-on expertise with Power BI (DAX, data modeling), Power Apps, and Power Automate.
Strong knowledge of SAP ECC data and reporting logic.
Proficiency in SQL and data transformation concepts; experience with data lake environments is a plus.
Advanced Excel and VBA skills.
Agile mindset with experience in backlog management and iterative delivery.
Strong communication skills and ability to bridge business and technical teams.
Fluency in English is required




Working Conditions




Permanent contract with an attractive salary package
Company car with fuel card
Representation fees
Meal vouchers
Mobile phone subscription
Group insurance & healthcare insurance
Possibility of remote work
20 legal vacation days + 12 compensatory days




What we offer




Access to exciting projects in key sectors: Transport, Energy, Automotive, Telecom, Finance
A diverse client base: Collaborations with both large corporations and smaller dynamic companies across Belgium
A real career development plan: Continuous training, coaching, daily knowledge sharing
An innovative and collaborative environment




About ALTEN




ALTEN is a world leader in engineering and technology consulting, with over 57 000 employees in more than 30 countries. We support major companies in their innovation, R&D, and digital transformation projects across sectors such as automotive, aerospace, energy, finance, life sciences, and telecommunications.

Present in Belgium for over 25 years, ALTEN Belgium operates from its offices in Brussels and Antwerp. Today, with a team of 700 consultants ALTEN Belgium offers a wide range of expertise across Engineering, Life Sciences, and IT fields. From Automotive to Railway, and Medtech to Agrifood, our experts deploy their knowledge to provide innovative solutions in a dynamic and forward-thinking environment.




Ready for a new challenge?

Apply now and take part in innovative and impactful projects at ALTEN Belgium!

Title: Traffic Accident Data Analysis Intern
Description:
In a nutshell

We are looking for an intern to analyse real-world traffic accident data and develop Python-based tools that support future vehicle safety.

Company Information

TOYOTA is one of the world’s largest automobile manufacturers and a leading global corporation. Founded in 1937. Toyota now sells vehicles in 170 countries and employs over 350.000 people. Based in Brussels, Belgium, and staffed by 2.700 people and more than 60 nationalities, Toyota Motor Europe (TME) handles the wholesale marketing of Toyota and Lexus vehicles, parts & accessories, and manages Toyota’s European R&D, manufacturing, and engineering operations.

We are excited to be transforming into a mobility company focusing on bringing even more happiness to our customers through various mobility solutions.

Team/division Description

Your team and your responsibilities

The Safety Research Technical Affairs Planning team (TAP) is part of the Research and Development group at Toyota Motor Europe Technical Center in Zaventem, Belgium. Our team consists of seven engineers, dealing with future safety requirements, mainly related to Euro NCAP assessment on Passive, Active safety and Automated Driving.

The goal of our group is to feed information to the development divisions and product planners who can then ensure that future requirements can be implemented.

Your project

One Of Our Main Goals Is To Identify Where Are Road Traffic Safety Problems, For Which Our Team Analyses Road Traffic Crashes From Different Datasets. Due To The Increased Demand From Development Divisions, We Want To Improve The Way We Analyse Data, In a Smarter, More Flexible And Automatised Way. The Tasks Will Be As Follows


Familiarise with the road crash database structure (e.g. GIDAS)
Build on existing Python scripts to further improve / integrate data extraction and analysis workflows
Develop robust Python scripts to address different research questions, including statistical methods, and enable data exploration across multiple data levels (via UI/ dashboard)
Support the future expansion of the tool through the integration of additional datasets


Your Profile


You are fluent in English, the business language used at Toyota Motor Europe.
You are currently enrolled in a Master’s programme (such as Data Analytics, Business Analytics, Engineering, or similar) and are available for a fulltime internship of six months starting in September in Zaventem.
You have hands-on experience with Python and enjoy developing and improving code, often building further on work created by previous team members.
You have experience with Power BI, or you are motivated to learn it, which is considered a plus.
You have a strong interest in data analysis and data querying and like turning data into insights.
You are well organised and apply a structured and careful approach when writing code.
You are open-minded, hands-on, and enjoy teamwork.


Starting date


1st of September 2026


Duration


6 months


Confidentiality

Due to business requirement, not all performed projects can be reflected in the internship report. This issue needs to be discussed with candidate/school in advance.

It is mandatory that applicants are students for the entire period of the internship.

We can only accept students with an EEA or Swiss citizenship (not requiring a work permit or visa to be eligible to perform an internship in Belgium)

We offer

We offer a dynamic multicultural work environment with broad opportunities to learn every day and exciting career pathways that help you explore different disciplines or areas of expertise.

Your benefits


Flexible working hours and hybrid working (homeworking, 10 days from abroad);
Company restaurant – Warm dishes, salads and desserts daily, including Japanese and traditional Belgian specialties, as well as a vegan/vegetarian option;
Sport facilities – Tennis, squash, volleyball, football and softball pitches are available at various Toyota sites;
Team building activities and other personnel related events;
Programs to support your physical and social well-being.


A truly diverse, equitable and inclusive workplace

At Toyota Motor Europe, we are committed to providing equal employment opportunity to all. All our recruitment decisions are based on the individual and their qualifications along with the job requirements. The selection process is without regard to nationality, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, religion, ethnicity, disability or other personal characteristics. We do not tolerate harassment or discrimination as our individual experiences and overall diversity is our key strength. Together we have the power to make a positive change and go beyond the ordinary.

If you need any specific consideration for the interview process due to disability or any other reason, please let the recruiter know.

  • You have a strong interest in data analysis and data querying and like turning data into insights.
  • You are well organised and apply a structured and careful approach when writing code.
  • You are open-minded, hands-on, and enjoy teamwork.

Starting date

  • 1st of September 2026

Duration

  • 6 months

Confidentiality

Due to business requirement, not all performed projects can be reflected in the internship report. This issue needs to be discussed with candidate/school in advance.

It is mandatory that applicants are students for the entire period of the internship.

We can only accept students with an EEA or Swiss citizenship (not requiring a work permit or visa to be eligible to perform an internship in Belgium)

 We offer

We offer a dynamic multicultural work environment with broad opportunities to learn every day and exciting career pathways that help you explore different disciplines or areas of expertise.

Your benefits

  • Flexible working hours and hybrid working (homeworking, 10 days from abroad);
  • Company restaurant – Warm dishes, salads and desserts daily, including Japanese and traditional Belgian specialties, as well as a vegan/vegetarian option;
  • Sport facilities – Tennis, squash, volleyball, football and softball pitches are available at various Toyota sites;
  • Team building activities and other personnel related events;
  • Programs to support your physical and social well-being.

A truly diverse, equitable and inclusive workplace

At Toyota Motor Europe, we are committed to providing equal employment opportunity to all. All our recruitment decisions are based on the individual and their qualifications along with the job requirements. The selection process is without regard to nationality, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, religion, ethnicity, disability or other personal characteristics. We do not tolerate harassment or discrimination as our individual experiences and overall diversity is our key strength. Together we have the power to make a positive change and go beyond the ordinary.

If you need any specific consideration for the interview process due to disability or any other reason, please let the recruiter know.

Title: Data Engineer
Description:
EMPOWERING LIVE




PMY is a full-service provider of technology, data, and creative solutions for the live environment.

With a growing global footprint across APAC, the USA, and EMEA, we are committed to delivering tailored, impactful solutions across sectors such as Sports & Entertainment, Stadiums & Arenas, Education, Public Sector & Infrastructure, and Retail.

We combine a global perspective with decades of experience, and deep local insight in key markets. At PMY, our goal is to deliver cutting-edge strategy, design, and operational services across the full technology ecosystem - powered by proprietary and bespoke intelligence solutions and activated by a passionate and experienced team.




We aim to be the world’s leading technology partner for the live environment, helping clients access critical insights, innovative capabilities, and end-to-end technical expertise that supports operational excellence and drives commercial and strategic success.
Across our group, we work to embody the PMY ethos - striving to be professional, dynamic, collaborative, and creative partners.
Each of our companies brings deep technical knowledge and diverse global experience, enabling us to provide a truly integrated, turn-key solution spanning consulting and design, implementation and operations, software, and data, as well as brand, creative, content, and fan experiences.




At PMY Group, we are proud to be working with more than 1,000 valued clients in 15 countries. We have built a team of more than 500 talented professionals with more than 40 years of combined industry experience.




ABOUT THE ROLE




We’re looking for a Data Engineer to join our growing EMEA team. This is an exciting opportunity for a hands-on engineer who enjoys building scalable data pipelines, working with modern cloud technologies, and delivering solutions that directly support sports, live events, venues, and operational environments.

You’ll work closely with Data Engineering Leads, Analytics, Product, and Platform teams to help turn raw data into reliable, analytics-ready assets that power reporting, operations, AI initiatives, and customer-facing products. This is a delivery-focused role where your work will have real visibility and impact across global projects and clients.




WHAT YOU’LL DO




Build and maintain modern data pipelines across ingestion, transformation, validation, and serving layers
Work with APIs, databases, files, event streams, and third-party data sources
Support reliable batch and near real-time data processing workflows
Develop reusable transformation logic and trusted datasets for analytics and reporting
Collaborate with Product Owners, Analysts, QA, DevOps, and Engineering teams to support smooth delivery
Contribute to strong engineering standards across testing, CI/CD, monitoring, documentation, and code reviews
Support troubleshooting, optimisation, and operational support across cloud-based environments
Help improve data quality, observability, scalability, and long-term maintainability of solutions
Contribute to reusable engineering patterns, delivery standards, and continuous improvement initiatives across EMEA teams
Support a product-aware engineering mindset focused on usability, reliability, and business value




WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR




Strong SQL skills and experience building production-ready data pipelines
3–6 years’ experience in Data Engineering, ETL/ELT development, Analytics Engineering, or related technical roles
Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP
Familiarity with tools such as dbt, Spark, Airflow, Dagster, or similar orchestration and transformation technologies
Experience working with data warehouses, lakehouse platforms, or distributed data environments
Good understanding of software engineering practices including Git, testing, CI/CD, and code reviews
Experience working with APIs, files, databases, and third-party data sources
Exposure to data quality, lineage, monitoring, and operational support practices
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
Strong communication and collaboration skills
Experience in consulting, client-facing, or distributed delivery environments is beneficial
Right to live and work in the relevant European hiring location is required




NICE TO HAVE




Experience within Sports, Entertainment, Stadiums, or Live Events
Exposure to real-time or event-driven data architectures
Experience supporting analytics, AI, or operational reporting initiatives
Familiarity with modern DevOps and cloud deployment practices
Interest in building reusable data products and trusted reporting datasets
Passion for sports, live environments, and technology-driven experiences




WHY PMY?




Growth: Scale your career with diverse projects and continuous learning.
Flexibility: Embrace a work-life balance with flexible hours and remote work opportunities.
Impact: Your work directly transforms the venue experience for millions.
Culture: Collaborate with a passionate team in a dynamic, innovative environment.
Benefits: Competitive compensation, fun team events and opportunities for personal and professional growth.




We strive to build a team that reflects the diversity of the communities we work in. We welcome and encourage applications from traditionally underrepresented groups in the technology industry, including women, older people, people with a disability and ethnic minorities.
